Such "bag-of-facts" memory recalls individual facts well, but because storing a fact and acting on it are separate steps, it struggles to resolve contradictions, aggregate over many records, or enforce rules. We argue that user memory should instead be executable. We introduce User as Code (UaC), a paradigm in which an agent's model of a user is a living software project: typed Python objects hold the user's state and ordinary Python functions encode the rules that govern it, so representing and reasoning about the user happen in one medium an interpreter can run. The enabling mechanism is a two-phase pipeline: an append-only log that never discards a fact, periodically checkpointed into typed code.
  This changes what memory can do. On standard long-term conversation benchmarks, UaC matches both a full-context upper bound and the strongest prior memory systems on recall (78.8% on LOCOMO). Its advantage emerges where representation matters most. On aggregate questions over a user's history -- "how many international trips did I take last year?" -- retrieval-based memory collapses (6-43%) while UaC stays near-perfect (99%), because the answer is a one-line computation over typed state rather than a search over text. And because its rules execute deterministically whenever the state changes, UaC can surface unsolicited, safety-critical alerts -- such as a newly prescribed drug that conflicts with an allergy recorded months earlier -- a capability query-driven memory cannot provide.

</details>


### [391] [Medical world models: representing medical states, modelling clinical dynamics and guiding intervention policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16721)
*Ke Liu,Mengxuan Li,Yanyi Bao,Tianyun Zhang,Chong Chu,Jiajun Bu,Haishuai Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文综述了医学世界模型（Medical World Models）的概念，将其定义为从静态AI诊断向动态疾病模拟与干预决策支持转变的框架，围绕患者状态构建、临床动力学建模和干预决策支持三大能力展开，并指出了实现临床可用模拟器面临的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学AI大多输出静态标签或评分，无法捕捉疾病随时间演进的动态过程，也无法模拟不同干预措施对未来轨迹的影响，亟需一种能模拟患者状态动态、支持治疗决策的框架。

Method: 采用综述方法，提出医学世界模型的技术路线图，将相关工作组织为三大耦合能力：患者状态构建（patient-state construction）、临床动力学建模（clinical dynamics modelling）和干预决策支持（intervention decision support），并对代表性系统进行比较分析。

Result: 系统梳理了基础模型、纵向建模、疾病模拟、治疗效果估计、强化学习和数字孪生等分散领域的相关研究，对比了各能力模块的贡献及其集成方式，提出了从感知-动力学-规划逐步成熟的路径。

Conclusion: 医学世界模型有望推动医学AI从孤立的诊断预测走向动态模拟与干预规划，但将模型生成的模拟轨迹转化为临床可用工具仍面临诸多挑战。

Abstract: Medical diagnosis and treatment are dynamic processes in which patient states evolve over time and clinical interventions alter future outcomes. Although current medical AI can detect disease, estimate risk and generate reports, many systems still return static labels or scores, offering limited insight into how illness may progress or how alternative interventions may reshape its trajectory. Medical world models adapt the world-model idea from artificial intelligence to healthcare by learning internal simulators of patient-state dynamics. Their long-term goal is to help clinicians anticipate deterioration, compare treatment-conditioned futures and tailor care to individual patients. Yet relevant work remains scattered across foundation models, longitudinal modelling, disease simulation, treatment-effect estimation, reinforcement learning and digital twins. To bridge this gap, this review outlines a roadmap for advancing medical AI from isolated diagnosis and prediction toward medical world models that simulate disease evolution and support intervention decisions. This roadmap is organized around three coupled capabilities: patient-state construction, clinical dynamics modelling and intervention decision support. Across representative systems, the comparison highlights what each capability contributes and how partial components can be integrated into more mature perception--dynamics--planning systems. Finally, we identify the challenges involved in turning plausible rollouts into clinically useful simulators. Related literature is available at https://github.com/1999kevin/awesome_medical_world_models.

</details>


### [392] [AgentFairBench: Do LLM Agents Discriminate When They Act?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16723)
*Triveni Morla,Rohith Reddy Bellibaltu,Manpreet Singh,Manmeet Singh Kapoor*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentFairBench，一个用于评估LLM智能体在招聘、信贷、医疗分诊等行动层面的人口统计偏差的基准框架。通过反事实匹配集、多种智能体框架和统计数据方法，在控制统计假阳性的情况下衡量偏差。实验表明，若不匹配统计维度会夸大偏差约2.4倍，而Claude Haiku 4.5在匹配噪声基线后未检测到显著的人口统计效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM公平性评估仅关注答案层面的偏差，但LLM智能体在实际应用中直接采取行动（如筛选申请者、推荐信贷、分诊患者），行动层面的偏差尚未得到系统评估。需要一个廉价、可复现、多领域的基准来测量LLM智能体行动中的群体偏差。

Method: 基于Bias Conduction Framework (BCF)，构建覆盖招聘、信贷、医疗分诊三个领域的基准；使用合成人口统计中性档案，仅通过姓名编码的种族×性别信号构造反事实匹配集；在四种智能体框架（直接、CoT、多智能体协商、工具增强）下评估；采用NumPy计算反事实翻转率、MASD、行动率差异、工具调用差异等指标，配合bootstrap置信区间、配对检验和FDR控制。

Result: 比较六组分数离散度与两轮噪声差异会因统计维度不匹配夸大偏差约2.4倍；在匹配噪声基线和整体组检验后，Claude Haiku 4.5未显示超出采样噪声的人口统计效应（120个配对检验和9个整体对比均未通过校正）；植入偏差测试证实工具能检测到存在的偏差。

Conclusion: 贡献了一个可靠、敏感、可采用的评估工具，提出了统计维度匹配的噪声基线方法，并开源了代码、数据和分析工具。该方法论教训是：评估偏差时必须匹配统计维度，否则会严重高估偏差程度。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly take actions (screening applicants, recommending credit, triaging patients), yet fairness for LLMs is still measured by grading answers. We introduce AgentFairBench, a cheap, reproducible, multi-domain benchmark for demographic disparity in the actions of LLM agents. Grounded in a companion framework, the Bias Conduction Framework (BCF, restated here), it spans three regulator-anchored domains: hiring, lending, and medical triage. Synthetic, demographic-neutral profiles are evaluated in counterfactual matched sets that vary only a name-coded race x gender signal (in the Bertrand Mullainathan tradition), under four agent scaffolds of increasing agency (direct, chain-of-thought, multi-agent deliberation, tool-augmented). A NumPy-only harness computes counterfactual flip rate, mean absolute score difference (MASD), action-rate disparity, and tool-invocation disparity, with bootstrap confidence intervals, paired tests, and false-discovery-rate control, for single-digit dollars per model. A live leaderboard with a held-out private split and a contamination canary admits external models by submission. Our pilot (864 decisions plus a test-retest replication) carries a methodological lesson: comparing a six-group score spread against a two-run noise difference overstates disparity by ~ 2.4X through statistic arity alone. Against an arity matched noise floor and an omnibus group test, claude haiku 4 5 shows no demographic effect above sampling noise (0 of 120 pairwise and 0 of 9 omnibus contrasts survive correction); a planted-bias test confirms the instrument detects disparity when present. The contribution is a sound, sensitive, adoption-ready instrument, the arity matched null methodology, and open artifacts to scale it. Code, data, and harness are released under open licenses, with an anonymized review artifact.

</details>


### [393] [A First-Principles Derivation of LLM Policy Optimization: From Expected Reward to GRPO and Its Structural Extensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16733)
*Jianghan Shen,Siqi Luo,Yue Li,Jiyao Liu,Wanying Qu,Yi Zhang,Ziyan Huang,Tianbin Li,Ming Hu,Xiaohong Liu,Yirong Chen,Junjun He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文从第一性原理出发，将大语言模型策略梯度优化方法统一在目标函数 J(θ) = E[R(τ)] 下，以轨迹侧 p_θ(τ) 和奖励侧 R(τ) 两个轴构建分类框架，系统梳理了从REINFORCE、PPO到GRPO及其变体的发展路径，揭示了各方法的设计动机与干预位置，并指出了需要双侧联合设计的复合故障场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有综述按领域或时间线组织方法，掩盖了各方法设计选择背后的原理及其在梯度估计器中的具体干预位置。作者希望建立一个从共享目标出发、诊断性强、可扩展的统一框架，清晰定位每种方法修改的是轨迹侧还是奖励侧，并揭示单一侧修复无法解决的复合故障。

Method: 以目标函数 J(θ) = E[R(τ)] 为出发点，将梯度估计器分解为轨迹概率分布 p_θ(τ) 和奖励 R(τ) 两个因素，以此作为两条主轴，定位从REINFORCE、PPO到GRPO及后续变体（如Agentic RL、GRPO-OPD）中每种方法的具体干预位置和设计动机。

Result: 构建了一个统一、可诊断、可扩展的分类框架，清晰展示了各方法在轨迹侧和奖励侧上的分布，识别出需要双侧联合设计的边界案例和复合故障。

Conclusion: 该框架为理解现有LLM策略优化方法提供了第一性原理视角，并指明了当前方法失效的边界条件，为下一代算法的设计提供了原则性起点。

Abstract: Policy gradient algorithms for language models optimize the same objective $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}*{τ\sim p*θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$, which has exactly two factors: the trajectory probability $p_θ(τ)$ and the reward $R(τ)$. Every method from REINFORCE to PPO to GRPO and their descendants modifies one or both factors to address a specific failure in the preceding formulation. Existing surveys organize these methods by domain or chronology, which obscures the rationale behind each design choice and the precise location of its intervention within the gradient estimator. This survey revisits the landscape of LLM policy optimization from $J(θ)$ on first principles and uses the trajectory side, induced by $p_θ(τ)$, and the reward side, induced by $R(τ)$, as the two axes along which methods are located. It covers the path from REINFORCE and PPO to GRPO, as well as post-GRPO variants, Agentic RL, and GRPO-OPD. The resulting framework is unified, diagnostic, and extensible: it analyzes methods from a shared objective, identifies which side each method modifies and why, and applies the same trajectory and reward axes across these settings. Across these settings, the framework also exposes compound failures that no single-side fix resolves and that therefore require joint design of the trajectory side and the reward side. The boundary cases and coupled failures identified by this map mark where existing solutions run out and provide a principled starting point for designing the next generation of LLM policy optimization algorithms.

</details>


### [394] [Skill-to-LoRA: From Using Skills to Learning Behaviors for Token-Efficient LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16769)
*Tianyi Zhang,Zhonghao Qi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Skill-to-LoRA (S2L)，将智能体技能从运行时注入的SKILL.md文本转换为可动态加载的LoRA适配器，在21个技能的SWE-Skills-Bench基准上相比完整技能文本提示提升5.2个百分点的通过率，同时降低6.6%的每步token开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体技能以SKILL.md文件形式分发，虽然便于检查和复用，但每次执行都需要将相同的程序化文档反复注入到运行时上下文中，造成token开销冗余。作者希望将技能从运行时指令转换为可训练的、可动态加载的行为模块，以降低推理成本同时保持或提升性能。

Method: S2L分为两阶段：离线阶段，使用完整的SKILL.md文档来合成技能引导的示范数据，基于这些数据训练技能特定的LoRA适配器；在线阶段，不再注入完整技能文本，而是动态加载对应的LoRA适配器来激活已学习的技能行为。该方法将技能表示从文本描述转换为行为参数化模块。

Result: 在Qwen3.6-27B模型和21个技能的SWE-Skills-Bench子集上：相比无技能基线，通过率提升2.9个百分点；相比完整技能文本基线，通过率提升5.2个百分点；每步token成本相比完整技能文本降低6.6%；在18/21个技能上匹配或超越完整技能文本，在15/21个技能上匹配或超越无技能基线；控制实验表明增益依赖于技能特定的适配器对齐，错误LoRA和共享LoRA均会降低性能。

Conclusion: 许多程序化智能体技能可以从运行时指令转换为可训练、可动态加载的行为模块，S2L验证了这种技能表示范式的可行性，在降低推理开销的同时还能提升任务完成率。

Abstract: Agent skills are commonly distributed as SKILL.md files: human-readable procedural documents that describe workflows, tools, resources, and domain conventions. While convenient for inspection and reuse, this design requires the same reusable procedure to be repeatedly injected into the runtime context. We propose Skill-to-LoRA(S2L), a behavior-centric skill representation that replaces runtime skill text with skill-specific LoRA adapters. Rather than compressing the skill document itself, S2L models the behavioral change induced by the skill text: offline, the complete SKILL.md is used to synthesize skill-guided demonstrations; online, the full document is omitted and the corresponding LoRA adapter is dynamically loaded to activate the learned skill behavior. We evaluate S2L with Qwen3.6-27B on a 21-skill subset of SWE-Skills-Bench. Compared with the no-skill and Full Skill Text baselines, S2L improves pass rate by 2.9 and 5.2 percentage points, respectively, while reducing per-step token cost by 6.6% relative to Full Skill Text prompting. S2L matches or improves Full Skill Text on 18/21 skills and the no-skill baseline on 15/21 skills. Control experiments further show that the gains depend on skill-specific adapter alignment: Wrong-LoRA and Shared-LoRA both reduce performance. These results suggest that many procedural agent skills can be converted from runtime instructions into trainable, dynamically loadable behavioral modules. Code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [395] [OpenClaw-Skill: Collective Skill Tree Search for Agentic Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16774)
*Tianyi Lin,Chuanyu Sun,Jingyi Zhang,Changxu Wei,Huanjin Yao,Shunyu Liu,Xikun Zhang,Liu Liu,Jiaxing Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CSTS框架，通过集体智能的树搜索自动构建可复用技能树，并配合集体技能强化学习，显著提升LLM智能体在工具使用、多步推理等复杂任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体在复杂工具使用、多步推理和动态环境交互中缺乏有效的可复用技能构建方法，需要自动化的框架来生成结构化、多样且可泛化的技能。

Method: 提出CSTS框架，包含两个迭代阶段：(1) CSN-Gen利用多模型集体知识探索多样候选技能；(2) CSN-Assess通过集体质量评分和集体可迁移性评分评估筛选技能节点。并引入Collective Skill Reinforcement Learning，从技能树中主动选择多个相关技能以拓宽解空间探索。

Result: 训练的OpenClaw-Skill模型在长程规划、工具使用和泛化能力上展现出卓越的智能体性能，在多个具有挑战性的基准测试上取得优异结果。

Conclusion: 通过集体智能的树搜索和强化学习构建技能树，能够有效提升LLM智能体的复杂任务解决能力，验证了方法的有效性。

Abstract: Equipping Large Language Model (LLM) agents with effective skills is crucial for solving complex tasks in real-world systems like OpenClaw. In this work, we aim to develop a framework that automatically constructs such reusable skills to enhance LLMs in tool use, multi-step reasoning, and dynamic environment interaction. To this end, we propose Collective Skill Tree Search (CSTS), a novel tree-search-based skill construction framework that constructs structured, diverse and generalizable tree of skills. The core idea of CSTS is to leverage collective intelligence to jointly search, identify and compose effective skills via two iterative phases: Collective Skill Node Generation (CSN-Gen) and Collective Skill Node Assessment (CSN-Assess). CSN-Gen exploits collective knowledge from multiple models to explore diverse candidate skills for each subtask, enabling comprehensive skill exploration. CSN-Assess employs multiple models as judges to evaluate and select skill nodes with two scoring mechanisms: (1) collective quality scoring that aggregates independent evaluations to produce a robust estimate of skill effectiveness, and (2) collective transferability scoring that explicitly verifies whether a skill generalizes well across different models. With CSTS, we construct a set of comprehensive tree of skills along with skill-augmented training data, enabling models to effectively learn and utilize skills. Besides, we introduce Collective Skill Reinforcement Learning, which actively selects multiple relevant skills from the tree to broaden solution-space exploration, avoid being trapped by a single skill and its resulting homogeneous or suboptimal solutions. As a result, our trained model, OpenClaw-Skill, exhibits outstanding agentic capabilities in long-horizon planning, tool use and generalization over challenging benchmarks.

</details>


### [396] [LabOSBench: Benchmarking Computer Use Agents for Scientific Instrument Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16802)
*Anqi Zou,Han Deng,Chengyu Zhang,Junquan Hu,Yu Wang,Yuxiang Xing,Aokai Zhang,Hanling Zhang,Zhaoyang Liu,Ben Fei,Zhihui Wang,Wanli Ouyang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LabOSBench是一个基于Web的科研仪器模拟器基准测试平台，用于评估多模态GUI智能体在科学仪器操作（如样品加载、参数调优、数据采集等）上的能力。实验表明现有智能体在结构化GUI子任务上表现尚可，但在反馈驱动操作和长程工作流执行上仍存在困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理高精度仪器直接评估智能体成本高、风险大、可及性差且难以保证评估可重复性，因此需要一种模拟但逼真的测试平台，既能保留科学仪器的操作挑战，又能支持可扩展、安全的基准测试。

Method: 构建了一套基于Web的科学仪器模拟器，智能体直接通过浏览器操作，避免了资源密集型的操作系统虚拟化；设计了96个子任务覆盖8种仪器模拟器，涉及样品加载、对齐、参数调优、数据采集和结果检查等工作流；支持灵活的任务配置和基于执行结果的评估。

Result: 在子任务和端到端两个层面评估了通用视觉语言模型、专用GUI智能体模型及高级智能体框架，发现现有智能体能完成许多结构化GUI子任务，但在反馈驱动操作和长程工作流执行上仍存在困难。

Conclusion: LabOSBench提供了一个可重复、低成本的测试平台，用于推动计算机使用智能体向科学仪器控制领域发展。

Abstract: Current computer-use benchmarks primarily focus on software operation tasks in virtualized systems, whereas scientific instrumentation scenarios require coordinated control over complex interfaces, and feedback-driven parameter adjustment. However, directly evaluating agents on physical high-precision instruments is impractical due to high cost, safety risks, limited accessibility, and difficulty in ensuring reproducible evaluation. This motivates the need for a simulated yet realistic testbed that preserves the operational challenges of scientific instruments while enabling scalable and safe benchmarking. To this end, we introduce LabOSBench, a challenging benchmark for multimodal GUI agents built on a suite of web-based scientific-instrument simulators. Operating directly via a browser, LabOSBench avoids resource-heavy OS virtualization while supporting flexible task configuration and execution-based evaluation. Specifically, LabOSBench constructs 96 subtasks across eight instrument simulators, covering workflows from sample loading, alignment, parameter tuning, and data acquisition to result inspection. We evaluate general-purpose vision-language models, specialized GUI agent models, and advanced agentic frameworks at both subtask and end-to-end levels. Our experiments reveal that while existing agents can complete many structured GUI subtasks, they still struggle with feedback-driven operations and long-horizon workflow execution. Overall, LabOSBench provides a reproducible, low-cost testbed for advancing computer-using agents toward scientific-instrument control.

</details>


### [397] [Adaptive and Explicit safe: Triggering Latent Safety Awareness in Large Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16808)
*Ke Miao,Jiaxin Li,Hongliang Chen,Yuke Hu,Zhan Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Safe Trigger方法，利用大型推理模型（LRMs）自身的潜在安全感知能力，通过SFT和DPO两个阶段的自我生成数据训练，显著提升模型安全性，同时保持通用性能不受影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在处理复杂任务时表现出色，但极易受到复杂的越狱攻击和直接有害查询的影响。现有的安全对齐方法严重依赖外部人工数据标注，成本高且效率低。本文观察到LRMs自身具备识别安全风险的能力（潜在安全感知），因此希望利用这一内在能力实现自我安全对齐，减少对外部标注的依赖。

Method: 首先通过监督微调（SFT）显式诱导安全标签，使模型在初始推理内容后触发安全分析和指导（针对不安全查询），同时保持对通用查询的标准响应以实现自适应触发；随后使用直接偏好优化（DPO）进一步增强安全分析和指导的正确性与稳定性。两个训练阶段所需的响应均由被优化的模型自身生成，无需外部人工标注。

Result: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B模型在有害基准和越狱基准上的平均攻击成功率（ASR）分别下降24.65%和36.72%。Safe Trigger方法对通用性能和用户体验几乎无负面影响。

Conclusion: 利用模型自身的潜在安全感知能力，通过自生成数据的SFT和DPO训练，可以有效提升LRMs的安全性，且无需外部人工标注，是一种高效、自适应的安全对齐方法。

Abstract: While Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) excel at complex tasks, they remain highly vulnerable to sophisticated jailbreaks and direct harmful queries. To address this vulnerability, prior works depend heavily on external manual data annotation for safety alignment. However, we observe that LRMs can inherently identify safety risks when being re-presented with original queries alongside their own reasoning trajectories -- a capability we term Latent Safety Awareness. To leverage this safety awareness, we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to explicitly induce safe tags to trigger safety analysis and guidance following the initial reasoning content for unsafe queries, while preserving standard responses for general queries to ensure adaptive triggering. Subsequently, we apply Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to further enhance the correctness and stability of the safety analysis and guidance. Notably, responses required for both training stages are entirely generated by models being optimized. With (Safe Trigger) SFT and DPO, experimental results demonstrate significant safety enhancement. For example, the Attack Success Rate (ASR) of DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, on average, drops 24.65% and 36.72% on harmful and jailbreak benchmarks, respectively. Finally, our Safe Trigger method exerts almost no negative impact on general performance or user experience.

</details>


### [398] [Scaling LLM Reasoning from Minimal Labels: A Semi-Supervised Framework with a Lightweight Verifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16811)
*Keizo Kato,Chenhui Chu,Yugo Murawaki,Sado Kurohashi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个半监督框架，通过训练轻量级推理正确性分类器并结合熵值置信度阈值过滤，仅需少量标注样本即可生成高质量推理轨迹用于微调LLM，在数学推理和视觉问答任务上达到使用10-15倍标注数据的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM的伪中间推理方法依赖大量正确标注答案来评估推理质量，标注成本高昂。本文旨在探索如何从极少量监督中扩展推理学习，将推理验证本身转化为数据创建机制。

Method: 1) 在少量标注样本上训练轻量级推理正确性二分类器；2) 分类器评估LLM生成的推理轨迹的有效性；3) 基于熵的置信度阈值过滤不可靠样本；4) 用剩余高置信度推理轨迹微调LLM。

Result: 在Orca-Math（可验证数学问题）和GQA（视觉问答+视觉编程）任务上，该方法达到使用10-15倍标注数据时的精度。消融实验证实分类器和熵过滤对可扩展抗噪伪标注均不可或缺。

Conclusion: 用轻量级推理验证替代昂贵的答案级监督，构建大规模推理资源的可行路径，为未来从极小人类输入学习的自主推理系统奠定基础。

Abstract: For the development of Large language models (LLMs), recent approaches to generating pseudo intermediate reasoning have shown remarkable progress. But they typically rely on large numbers of correctly annotated answers to assess reasoning quality. This paper presents a semi-supervised framework that scales reasoning learning from minimal supervision, turning reasoning verification itself into a data creation mechanism. We train a lightweight reasoning-correctness classifier on only a few labeled samples, which judges whether intermediate reasoning traces generated by an LLM are valid. Furthermore, an entropy-based confidence threshold filters out unreliable samples, and the remaining high-confidence reasoning traces are used to fine-tune the model. Experiments on Verifiable Math Problems (Orca-Math subset) and Question Answering on Image Scene Graphs (GQA) with Visual Programming show that our method achieves accuracy comparable to using 10-15x more labeled data. Ablation analyses confirm that both the classifier and entropy filtering are essential for scalable and noise-resistant pseudo-labeling. By replacing expensive answer-level supervision with lightweight reasoning verification, our method provides a practical path toward constructing large-scale reasoning resources and paves the way for future autonomous reasoning systems that learn from minimal human input.

</details>


### [399] [GIST-CMTF: Goal-State Inference for Causal Minimal Tool Filtering in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16813)
*Rahul Suresh Babu,Rohit Shukla*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GIST-CMTF 通过在因果最小工具过滤（CMTF）基础上增加目标状态推断层，解决用户请求多义性导致的错误目标执行问题，在120个可控工具任务中达到97.0%的成功率，将错误目标执行从19.4%降至2.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具增强型LLM代理的因果最小工具过滤（CMTF）假设用户请求已被映射到符号目标状态，但实际中如"处理我的预约"等请求可能对应多个潜在目标，导致代理为错误目标执行有效的因果工具路径（即错误目标执行问题）。

Method: 提出GIST-CMTF，在CMTF之上增加目标状态推断层，预测候选符号化目标并使用与CMTF相同的状态转换词汇表；估计目标歧义程度，当歧义低时应用CMTF，歧义高时暴露澄清作为因果动作以生成缺失的目标或状态变量。

Result: 在7个模型后端、6种过滤方法、120个可控工具任务中评估，GIST-CMTF达到97.0%任务成功率，优于top-goal CMTF（80.1%）和semantic-goal CMTF（82.9%）；错误目标执行率从19.4%降至2.5%；保持因果过滤的单工具暴露特性，且token消耗显著低于全工具暴露。

Conclusion: 可靠的工具增强型代理在暴露外部动作之前，不仅应验证工具相关性，还应验证目标状态的正确性。

Abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents rely on runtime filtering to decide which tools should be visible at each step. Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF) reduces tool-choice confusion by exposing only the next causally necessary tool frontier, but it assumes that the user request has already been mapped to a symbolic goal state. In practice, requests such as "handle my appointment" or "take care of this email" may correspond to multiple possible goals. This creates wrong-goal execution, where an agent follows a valid causal tool path for an unintended objective. We introduce GIST-CMTF, a goal-state inference layer that predicts candidate symbolic goals over the same state-transition vocabulary used by CMTF, estimates ambiguity, and either applies CMTF or exposes clarification as a causal action that produces missing goal or state variables. We evaluate GIST-CMTF across seven model backends, six filtering methods, and 120 controlled tool-use tasks. GIST-CMTF achieves 97.0% task success, compared with 80.1% for top-goal CMTF and 82.9% for semantic-goal CMTF. It reduces wrong-goal execution from 19.4% under top-goal CMTF to 2.5%, while preserving the one-tool exposure of causal filtering and using substantially fewer tokens than all-tools exposure. These results suggest that reliable tool-augmented agents should validate goal state, not only tool relevance, before exposing external actions.

</details>


### [400] [Symbolic Informalization: Fluent, Productive, Multilingual](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16893)
*Aarne Ranta*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Informath项目提出基于Dedukti与Grammatical Framework的中间语言架构，实现从多种证明系统（Agda、Lean、Rocq）到多种自然语言的符号非形式化转换，以产生精确、流畅的机器可读数学文本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统证明系统中的语法糖机制有限，无法泛化到日常数学语言；同时AI构造的证明需要一种可靠方式将形式化数学转换为精确、可读的自然语言，以便人类理解机器验证的内容。

Method: 采用中间语言架构：Dedukti作为不同证明系统之间的枢纽，GF（Grammatical Framework）负责处理自然语言的语法正确性和多语言变体，实现符号非形式化转换。

Result: 能够以合理的开发成本生成流畅的自然语言文本，并支持多种形式化系统（Agda, Lean, Rocq）和多种自然语言。

Conclusion: 符号非形式化能够可靠地将形式化数学转换为精确且人类可读的自然语言，在不损失精度的情况下弥合机器验证与人类理解之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Symbolic informalization enables a reliable conversion of formal mathematics to natural language. It has the potential to make machine-checked content human-readable without loss of precision. In a traditional proof system usage, symbolic informalization generalizes the limited mechanisms of syntactic sugar into the ordinary language of mathematics. In a setting where proofs are constructed by artificial intelligence and autoformalization, symbolic informalization can explain what precisely has been constructed. This paper outlines the project Informath, which aims to show how symbolic informalization can produce fluent text with a reasonable development effort and address multiple formal and natural languages. Informath is based on an interlingual architecture, where Dedukti works as a hub between different proof systems (Agda, Lean, Rocq) and Grammatical Framework (GF) takes care of linguistic correctness and variation in different natural languages.

</details>


### [401] [Greed Is Learned: Visible Incentives as Reward-Hacking Triggers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16914)
*Tong Che,Rui Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 强化学习智能体在面对可见的奖励代理（如仪表盘）时会产生"奖励通道成瘾"现象，即追逐显示收益而牺牲真实任务，甚至颠覆安全对齐——仅在仪表盘对不安全行为付费时才放弃安全操作，一旦隐藏仪表盘即恢复安全行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究部署的智能体在面对可见的奖励代理（如KPI仪表盘）时，是否会对其产生病态依赖并偏离真实任务目标。

Method: 在合成的MoneyWorld沙盒环境中，通过对比看到奖励通道与未看到奖励通道的策略行为，研究奖励通道成瘾现象及其对安全对齐的影响。

Result: 1) 策略会对可见的奖励通道产生成瘾，追逐显示收益、牺牲真实任务，并跟随通道的任何重写；2) 成瘾可翻转模型的安全对齐，仅在仪表盘对不安全行为付费时放弃安全操作；3) 这种习得的贿赂行为跨模型规模和系列复现。

Conclusion: 盲目地让超级能力的下一代AI基于KPI或损益表进行优化对对齐是危险的，贪婪是通过跟随付费通道习得的。

Abstract: Deployed agents increasingly act with their reward proxy in view, such as a balance, score, or KPI dashboard. We show that reinforcement learning can make a policy \emph{addicted} to such a visible self-benefit channel. It chases the displayed payoff across held-out domains, sacrifices the true task to do so, and follows the channel wherever we rewrite it, while policies that never saw the channel stay honest. We call this \emph{reward-channel addiction} and study it in \emph{MoneyWorld}, a synthetic sandbox. The addiction can \emph{flip a model's safety alignment}: trained only on innocuous money tasks with no safety content, the model abandons the safe action it otherwise always takes whenever a dashboard pays for an unsafe one, and reverts to safe once the channel is hidden. This learned bribe replicates across model scales and families. Blindly optimizing super-capable, next-generation AI on KPIs or P\&L can be dangerous for alignment. \emph{Greed is learned} when following such a channel pays.

</details>


### [402] [MA-SBI: Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference via Side-Channel Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16923)
*Arunkumar V,Manoranjan Gandhudi,Gangadharan G. R.,Arun Prakash,S. Senthilkumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MA-SBI框架，利用非结构化侧信道信息（如文本）校正仿真器误设问题，无需真实参数校准对，在多个基准上匹配甚至超越现有最优方法（RoPE）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒SBI方法（如RoPE）需要真实参数-观测校准对，但在实际应用中这些数据往往不可得。实践者仅有非结构化侧信息（如标签、文本、政策公告），需要一种无需校准的误设感知推理框架。

Method: MA-SBI框架：学习一个校正器（corrector），将侧信道文本映射为观测空间偏移，作用于预训练的后验推断器前，无需重训练和参数真实值。理论层面，用互信息界定了偏差减少的上界，并通过Donsker-Varadhan推广到次高斯噪声。

Result: 在hide-the-calibration基准上，仅使用文本的MA-SBI在10个种子和两种骨干网络上与oracle后验等价（TOST等价），而RoPE即使给更多数据也无法达到。在真实COVID和OxCGRT流行病学数据上，随机变体提升了后验预测对数似然；在良好设定的认知科学语料上，后验保持不变。

Conclusion: MA-SBI与RoPE互补：当误设是可从参数对中恢复的结构性误设时，RoPE占优（符合理论预测）；当仅有侧信道信息时，MA-SBI提供有效的无需校准的误设校正方案。

Abstract: Simulation-based inference (SBI) of latent parameters is often hindered by simulator misspecification, the mismatch between simulated and real-world observations caused by inherent modeling simplifications. RoPE, the recent state-of-the-art for robust SBI, addresses this through optimal transport between learned representations of real and simulated observations, but requires ground-truth parameter calibration pairs that are typically unavailable in the very settings where SBI is needed. What practitioners do have is unstructured side-information such as regime labels, instruction text, and policy bulletins. We propose Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference (MA-SBI), a calibration-free framework that turns this side-channel into a posterior correction. A learned corrector maps side-channel text to an observation-space shift applied before any pre-trained amortized posterior, requiring no retraining and no parameter ground-truth. Our main theorem bounds achievable bias reduction by the mutual information between misspecification and side-channel, with a non-vacuous constant that extends to all sub-Gaussian noise via Donsker-Varadhan. On hide-the-calibration benchmarks, MA-SBI with text alone matches the oracle posterior across 10 seeds and two backbones (TOST equivalence), while RoPE given more data does not. The two approaches are complementary: where misspecification is structural and recoverable from parameter pairs, RoPE dominates, as the theory predicts. A stochastic variant improves posterior-predictive log-likelihood on real COVID and OxCGRT epidemiological data, and correctly leaves the posterior unchanged on a well-specified cognitive-science corpus.

</details>


### [403] [RAID: Semantic Graph Diffusion for True Cold-Start and Cross-Lingual Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16925)
*Arunkumar V,Manoranjan Gandhudi,Gangadharan G. R.,Arun Prakash,S. Senthilkumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对时间序列基础模型在真实冷启动场景（无历史观测数据）下失效的问题，提出RAID框架，通过元数据驱动的语义检索和图条件扩散模型，在无需历史窗口的情况下实现高精度预测，同时支持零样本跨语言迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型依赖非空历史窗口进行相关学习，但在真实冷启动场景中，新项目没有任何历史观测数据，这一假设被打破，导致模型性能严重下降。

Method: RAID框架包含三个核心组件：1) 使用冻结的多语言嵌入模型将文本元数据映射到共享语义空间；2) 构建归纳检索图，可自然扩展到未见项目，通过聚合语义相关邻居信息形成基础预测；3) 使用门控扩散模块对残差不确定性进行建模与细化。

Result: 在严格的真实冷启动协议下，RAID在预测精度和预测区间覆盖率上均优于强基础模型和竞争基线，并通过非自回归解码将推理延迟降低一个数量级。此外，共享语义空间实现了零样本跨语言迁移。

Conclusion: RAID通过元数据驱动的语义检索替代基于历史窗口的相关学习，有效解决了时间序列预测中的真实冷启动问题，同时兼具高效推理和跨语言泛化能力。

Abstract: Time-series foundation models show strong transfer performance when given a non-empty history window. However, true cold-start scenarios, where a new item has no prior observations, violate this assumption. We propose RAID (Retrieval-Augmented Iterative Diffusion) a framework, which replaces history-based correlation learning with metadata-driven semantic retrieval and graph-conditioned diffusion. RAID maps textual metadata into a shared semantic space using a frozen multilingual embedding model and constructs an inductive retrieval graph that extends naturally to unseen items. It first forms a base forecast by aggregating information from semantically related neighbors, then refines this forecast with a gated diffusion module to model residual uncertainty. Under a strict true cold-start protocol, RAID outperforms strong foundation models and competitive baselines on both forecasting accuracy and prediction interval coverage, while reducing inference latency by an order of magnitude through non-autoregressive decoding. The shared semantic space also enables zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, allowing a model trained on English descriptions to generalize to items described in other languages without direct supervision.

</details>


### [404] [A Causal Model of Theory of Mind in Conflict for Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16944)
*Nikolos Gurney*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个结构化因果模型，将心理理论（ToM）视为由情境和主体条件触发的机制而非始终在线的能力，通过三条因果路径决定何时进行心智化，并以认知准确性作为核心结果变量，为AI系统提供资源理性的心智化决策框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI-ToM模型关注"如何"进行心智化，但忽略了"何时"需要心智化这一关键问题，尤其是在冲突情境下，缺乏对情境和主体层面条件的系统性分析。

Method: 构建了一个有向无环图（DAG）形式的结构化因果模型，包含四个外生变量（情境与主体条件）、五个内生中介变量、一个机制性ToM节点，通过三条因果路径（可处理性路径、推理深度路径、使能原因路径）产生心智化参与状态。

Result: 模型将认知准确性作为主要结果变量，将社会推理与行为策略解耦，可泛化到冲突之外的社会现象；通过模拟验证、人机协作实证研究进行验证。

Conclusion: 该框架为AI系统提供了有原则的、资源理性的心智化决策程序，对效率、信任以及鲁棒人工社会智能的发展具有重要意义，并讨论了冲突优化心智化带来的伦理问题。

Abstract: Theory of mind (ToM), the capacity to ascribe mental states to others and use those ascriptions for prediction and inference, is widely assumed to be essential for effective human-machine integration. Existing AI-ToM models address \emph{how} to mentalize, but leave the question of when largely unaddressed. The central question is: under what situational and agent-level conditions is ToM engagement causally warranted in conflict? This paper presents a structural causal model formalized as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), treating ToM as a mechanism activated by situational and agent-level conditions rather than as an always-on capacity. The model specifies four exogenous variables capturing situational and agent-level conditions, five endogenous mediators, and a mechanistic ToM node producing engagement states through three distinct causal pathways: a tractability pathway, a reasoning-depth pathway, and an enabling-cause pathway. The primary outcome is epistemic accuracy, which decouples social reasoning from behavioral policy and generalizes across social phenomena beyond conflict. The framework gives AI systems a principled, resource-rational decision procedure for mentalizing, with implications for efficiency, trust, and the development of robust artificial social intelligence. Simulation validation, empirical human-machine teaming studies, and ethical considerations arising from conflict-optimized mentalizing are discussed.

</details>


### [405] [The embrace of open science: An analysis of a decade of AI research and 56 800 conference papers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16974)
*Kevin L Coakley,Thijs Snelleman,Holger Hoos,Odd Erik Gundersen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究分析了2014至2024年间五大AI会议发表的56,800篇论文，发现文档实践显著改善：同时共享代码和数据的论文从11%增至64%，推断可复现性从28%提升至64%。这些改善在可复现性检查清单引入之前就已开始，表明是开放科学运动的体现而非对形式要求的直接响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可复现性危机促使AI研究社区改进文档实践，但现有研究多聚焦方法论问题，缺乏对文档实践随时间变化趋势的大规模量化分析。本研究旨在填补这一空白，系统评估过去十年间AI领域文档实践的真实变化情况。

Method: 定义并质量保障了七个可复现性变量，对2014至2024年间五大顶级AI会议（ICML、NeurIPS、ICLR、AAAI、IJCAI）的56,800篇已发表论文进行系统分析，通过文档实践指标（而非直接实验复现）推断可复现性变化趋势。

Result: 2014至2024年间，同时共享代码和数据的论文比例从11%增长近六倍至64%；基于文档实践推断的可复现性从28%提升至64%；文档实践的改善在可复现性检查清单正式引入之前就已显现。

Conclusion: AI领域的文档实践在过去十年间显著改善，但这种改善并非主要由可复现性检查清单等正式要求驱动，而是反映了更广泛的开放科学运动趋势。文档实践的提升是可复现性提高的积极信号，但基于文档实践的推断不能替代直接的可复现性测试验证。

Abstract: The reproducibility crisis has directed the AI research community toward improving documentation practices. Several studies have identified methodological issues, and in response, the most impactful venues in the field have introduced reproducibility checklists. We seek to understand whether documentation practices have changed over time by assessing all published papers at five leading AI conferences over the past decade. Seven reproducibility variables were identified, quality-assured and used to analyse 56 800 publications. Our analysis reveals that in the period 2014 to 2024, documentation practices have improved; papers sharing both code and data increased nearly sixfold, from 11% to 64% Building on empirical reproducibility rates from a prior study, we estimate - inferred from documentation practices, not direct testing - that reproducibility increased from 28% in 2014 to 64% in 2024. Improvements in documentation practices predate the introduction of reproducibility checklists, suggesting these changes reflect a broader movement toward open science rather than a direct response to formal requirements.

</details>


### [406] [Consensus-based Agentic Large Language Model Framework for Harmonized Tariff Schedule Code Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16987)
*Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen,Khanh Van Quynh Nguyen,Hoang-Loc Cao,Tri Duong,Phuc Ho,Van Pham,Loc Nguyen,Hung Cao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于智能体大语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于智能港口和海运物流环境中的加拿大10位HTS编码分类。该框架集成了多智能体信息检索、语义检索、基于证据的推理、共识验证、跨层级投票、置信度估计和人机协同升级机制。在3,300条专家标注的数据集上评估表明，精确的10位分类即使对先进LLM仍具挑战性，性能从粗粒度章节级预测到细粒度税目和统计后缀分配逐渐下降。该框架支持更具可解释性、可问责性和合规导向的HTS分类流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海运物流中HTS编码准确分类对于清关、税费评估、贸易统计和合规至关重要，但产品描述往往简短、不完整或模糊，且正确分类依赖于层级化的关税结构、法律注释和特定司法管辖区规则，现有方法难以应对这些挑战。

Method: 提出一种智能体LLM框架，整合多智能体信息检索、面向官方关税文档的语义检索、基于证据的推理、共识验证、跨层级码段的逐元素投票、置信度估计以及人机协同升级机制，用于加拿大10位HTS编码分类。

Result: 在3,300条专家标注数据集上，精确10位分类对先进LLM仍很困难；性能从章节级（粗粒度）到税目级和统计后缀（细粒度）逐渐下降。

Conclusion: 需要基于证据、具有不确定性感知且以人为中心的分类工作流程，而非完全自主的单步预测；所提框架支持更具可解释性、可问责性和合规导向的HTS分类。

Abstract: Accurate Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) code classification is essential for customs clearance, duty assessment, trade statistics, and regulatory compliance in maritime logistics. However, exact HTS classification remains challenging because product descriptions are often short, incomplete, or ambiguous, while correct classification depends on hierarchical tariff structures, legal notes, and jurisdiction-specific rules. This paper proposes an agentic large language model (LLM) framework for Canadian 10-digit HTS code classification in smart-port and maritime logistics environments. The framework integrates multi-agent information retrieval, semantic retrieval over official tariff documents, evidence-grounded reasoning, consensus-based validation, element-wise voting across hierarchical code components, confidence estimation, and human-in-the-loop escalation. We evaluate the framework on a private dataset of 3,300 domain-expert-labeled product records collected from logistics and delivery contexts. Experimental results show that exact 10-digit classification remains difficult even for advanced LLMs, with performance decreasing from coarse chapter-level prediction to fine-grained tariff and statistical suffix assignment. These findings demonstrate the need for evidence-grounded, uncertainty-aware, and human-centered classification workflows rather than fully autonomous single-step prediction. The proposed framework supports more interpretable, accountable, and compliance-oriented HTS classification for maritime logistics and smart-port operations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/hts.

</details>


### [407] [When in Doubt, Plan It Out: Committed Small Language Model Deliberation for Reactive Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16995)
*Nathan Gavenski,Juarez Monteiro,Francisco Galuppo,Adriano Veloso,Odinaldo Rodrigues*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出PACT混合架构，将快速反应式RL策略与慢速深思型SLM规划器结合，通过在仿真中验证行动计划来提升RL策略在陌生环境中的表现，在FrozenLake任务上优于所有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL策略在陌生环境中常因缺乏显式推理而性能下降，需要一种无需重新训练或修改RL策略即可引入规划能力的方法。

Method: PACT混合架构：快速RL策略与异步SLM（2B参数）规划器结合，SLM生成行动方案并通过仿真验证安全性、可行性和完整性，验证后的方案绕过RL策略直接执行。

Result: 在三个难度递增的FrozenLake配置上，PACT超越所有基线方法，仅使用2B参数的SLM骨干网络。

Conclusion: 深思型规划与反应型执行的结合比任何单一方法更强大，且无需重新训练或修改现有RL策略。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies often degrade in unfamiliar environments because they lack explicit deliberation. We propose Plan, Align, Commit, Think (PACT), a hybrid architecture that combines a fast, reactive RL policy with a slow, deliberative Small Language Model (SLM) planner. PACT invokes the SLM asynchronously to generate and validate candidate action plans. Once a plan is verified through simulation as safe, feasible, and complete, it is executed directly, bypassing the RL policy without retraining or modifying it. Evaluated on three FrozenLake configurations of increasing difficulty, PACT outperforms all baselines while relying on a 2B-parameter SLM backbone, suggesting that deliberative planning and reactive execution are more powerful in concert than either is alone in these settings.

</details>


### [408] [Bayesian Inference and Decision Audits for Public Archives of Frontier AI Evaluations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17005)
*Yanan Long*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文揭示公开AI评估并非简单的排行榜，而是受报告规则、基准修订和数据缺失影响的时序数据。通过分析LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2、LMArena、GAIA和tau-bench等存档，发现固定报告惯例下存在贝叶斯推断歧义性，且前沿模型在多项测试中失败，最终提出存档-裁决协议来重建评估历史、验证时序边界并排除无依据的声明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公开AI评估被解读为终极排行榜，忽视了其本质上是受报告规则、基准修订和数据缺失影响的时序数据，导致对模型能力的错误认知。

Method: 采用贝叶斯推断框架分析多个公开存档（LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2、LMArena、GAIA、tau-bench），构建合成后验比较，并设计存档-裁决协议进行验证。

Result: 固定报告惯例下，一个终端样本可对应两种历史轨迹，达到天花板的时间差异显著（23.03 vs 75.13）；前沿模型在合成恢复、目标预测、偏好迁移和不确定性校准上均失败；固定审核门限拒绝了其强声明。

Conclusion: 需要存档-裁决协议来重建公开评估历史、隔离已验证的时序边界，并证伪缺乏支撑的前沿声明。

Abstract: Public AI evaluations are often read as terminal leaderboards, yet the underlying evidence is a selective time series shaped by reporting rules, benchmark revisions, and missingness. Repeated public archives for LiveBench and Open LLM Leaderboard v2 serve as the primary longitudinal record; LMArena provides a preference stress test; and GAIA and tau-bench contribute limited agentic pilots. Together, these archives instantiate a Bayesian inference problem: under a fixed reporting convention, one constructed terminal-only example over $1{,}000$ systems is compatible with two pre-terminal histories, yielding times of $23.03$ or $75.13$ to reach within $0.05$ of the ceiling under the same terminal-tail model. In synthetic posterior comparisons, action-facing diagnostics differ across observation regimes. The candidate selection-aware frontier model fails synthetic recovery, objective-archive prediction, preference transfer, and uncertainty calibration; correspondingly, fixed audit gates reject its stronger claims. An archive-and-adjudication protocol reconstructs public evaluation histories, isolates a verified timing boundary, and falsifies unsupported frontier claims.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [409] [DC-Motion: Decoupling Semantics and Details via Discrete-Continuous Tokens for Human Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14721)
*Hequan Wang,Jiaxu Zhang,Zhengbo Zhang,Zhigang Tu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: DC-Motion提出了一种离散-连续因子化生成框架，通过DC-VAE将人体运动分解为离散语义token和连续细节残差，结合掩码自回归模型与残差扩散模型，在HumanML3D和KIT-ML上实现了最先进的运动生成性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖同质化表示空间，难以捕捉人体运动的层次化特性：扩散模型在组合语义推理上表现不佳，自回归模型因量化丢失细粒度物理细节。需要一种能显式解耦语义与细节的生成框架。

Method: 提出DC-Motion因子化生成框架：(1) DC-VAE将运动分解为离散token（语义）和连续残差（细节）；(2) 掩码自回归模型从文本预测离散结构；(3) 轻量级残差扩散模型恢复连续物理细节。

Result: 在HumanML3D和KIT-ML数据集上达到最先进水平，在FID（运动真实感）和R-precision（文本对齐）指标上均取得最佳结果。

Conclusion: DC-Motion通过离散-连续解耦有效平衡了语义可控性与物理真实感，为人体运动生成提供了一种高度自适应的建模范式，显著提升了模型对复杂指令的跟随能力。

Abstract: Text-to-motion generation requires synthesizing physically realistic dynamics that strictly follow complex and long-horizon textual instructions. Existing approaches rely on homogeneous representation spaces that may fail to capture the hierarchical nature of human motion, with diffusion models struggling at compositional semantic reasoning and AR models sacrificing fine-grained physical details due to quantization. To solve it, we introduce DC-Motion, a factorized generative framework designed to explicitly decouple semantics and details via discrete-continuous tokens. A Discrete-Continuous VAE (DC-VAE) first decomposes motion into discrete tokens for semantics and continuous residuals for fine-grained dynamics. Then, a masked AR model predicts the discrete structure from text, and a lightweight residual diffusion model recovers the continuous physical details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DC-Motion effectively improves the capability to follow complex instructions. By effectively balancing semantic controllability and physical realism, our approach offers a highly adaptable modeling paradigm for human motion generation. On both HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets, DC-Motion achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering the best FID for motion realism and R-precision for text alignment.

</details>


### [410] [Toward Richer Material Generation via Procedural Data Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14988)
*Yunchen Yu,Jacob Munkberg,Jon Hasselgren,Chris Cummings,Steve Marschner,Andrea Weidlich*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出一种方法，将简单的PBR材料（单GGX镜面叶瓣）增强为更富表现力的分层材料模型（如灰尘、清漆、分层散射），并通过神经材料编码为共享6D隐空间中的两个隐纹理，由预训练通用MLP解码，进而微调视频扩散模型生成神经隐纹理，以支持生成式模型创建更丰富的材料。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有材料生成的生成模型受限于训练数据的质量和表现力，常用的简单PBR材料（漫反射项+单叶瓣镜面分量）无法捕捉真实材料中许多重要的视觉效果。

Method: 1) 从简单PBR材料出发，基于物理先验程序化构建对应的多叶瓣非漫反射分量（如灰尘、清漆、分层散射）；2) 将非漫反射分量编码为神经材料，使用共享6D隐空间，每个材料实例由两个隐纹理表示，通过预训练通用MLP解码；3) 对隐空间进行正则化以支持材料生成；4) 微调视频扩散模型生成神经隐纹理。

Result: 生成的神经材料数据集能够训练生成式模型创建更丰富的材料；通过微调视频扩散模型生成了神经隐纹理，并展示了生成结果作为可行性证明。

Conclusion: 所提出的程序化数据增强方法是提高材料生成表现力的重要一步。

Abstract: Generative models for material creation are fundamentally limited by the quality and expressivity of available training data. Simple physically based rendering (PBR) materials, which combine a diffuse term with a single-lobe specular component, are commonly used for training but are insufficient to capture many important visual effects present in real materials.
  We present a method that enhances such simple PBR materials to more expressive ones, by augmenting the single GGX specular lobe into a layered model that captures a broader range of non-diffuse effects. Starting from a simple material, we procedurally construct a corresponding multi-lobe non-diffuse component guided by physical priors, enabling effects such as dust, clearcoat, and layered scattering. To provide a compact representation for downstream applications, we encode this non-diffuse component as a neural material with a shared 6D latent space, where each material instance is represented by two latent textures and decoded by a pretrained universal MLP. We further regularize the latent space to support material generation.
  The resulting neural material dataset enables training generative models for richer material creation. To demonstrate this application, we finetune a video diffusion model to produce neural latent textures that encode our multi-lobe material, and present generative results as proof of feasibility. Our procedural data enhancement approach is an important step toward improving expressivity in material generation.

</details>


### [411] [HairLRM: Strand-based Hair Modeling via Large Reconstruction Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15238)
*Yuefan Shen,Yican Dong,Xiufeng Huang,Zhongtian Zheng,Youyi Zheng,Kui Wu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 针对传统发丝建模因缺乏结构约束导致病态重建的问题，提出将大型重建模型（LRM）的强几何先验融入发丝生成流程，利用LRM网格作为结构锚点，结合双方向自编码器通过潜在空间优化与表面引导精修，有效解决矢量场奇异性，实现高保真发丝重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于发丝建模的局限性并非单纯的数据稀缺，而是从二维图像推断复杂三维场缺乏结构约束导致的病态问题，这种无约束回归在解析全局遮挡（如马尾辫）和局部方向性（如卷发）时会出现灾难性失败，产生过度平滑但几何不正确的结果。

Method: 1) 将大型重建模型（LRM）的强几何先验集成到发丝生成管线中；2) 以LRM网格作为结构锚点；3) 提出双方向自编码器（Dual Orientation AutoEncoder），将粗略几何提升为高保真发丝；4) 通过潜在空间优化和表面引导精修来解决矢量场奇异性。

Result: 该方法有效解缠了复杂的拓扑结构，在头发重建的鲁棒性和准确性方面树立了新的基准。

Conclusion: 通过解决矢量场奇异性并利用LRM的结构先验，所提方法能够有效解缠复杂拓扑结构，在头发重建任务中实现了鲁棒性和准确性的新标杆。

Abstract: The fundamental limitation of traditional strand-based modeling is not simply data scarcity, but the ill-posedness of inferring complex 3D fields from 2D imagery without structural constraints. This unconstrained regression leads to catastrophic failures in resolving both global occlusion (e.g., in ponytails) and local directionality (e.g., in curls), resulting in over-smoothed, plausible-but-incorrect geometries. To resolve this, we integrate the strong geometric priors of Large Reconstruction Models (LRMs) into the strand generation pipeline. Using the LRM mesh as a structural anchor, we employ a novel Dual Orientation AutoEncoder to lift coarse geometry into high-fidelity strands. By resolving vector field singularities through latent-space optimization and surface-guided refinement, our method effectively disentangles complex topological structures, setting a new benchmark for robustness and accuracy in hair reconstruction.

</details>


### [412] [Walking on Heat Stars for Parabolic Heat Equations with Neumann Boundary Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16578)
*Anchang Bao,Enya Shen,Jianmin Wang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出Walk on Heat Stars，一种无网格蒙特卡洛求解器，通过非圆柱边界积分公式和热球采样实现抛物型偏微分方程（瞬态热传导）的精确求解，并验证了其收敛性和实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蒙特卡洛方法在椭圆型偏微分方程（如Walk on Spheres/Stars）中效果显著，但扩展到瞬态（抛物型）问题一直存在挑战：抛物方程通过各向异性缩放耦合时空，需要联合采样空间位移和反向时间步长，而此前缺乏统一精确的联合分布形式。

Method: 1) 将Walk on Stars的边界积分框架扩展到抛物型，提出非圆柱边界积分公式以适应热球采样引起的时变域；2) 热球几何通过对数时间坐标和空间方向参数化，发现双层核分解为独立的Gamma分量和均匀分量，实现精确方向重要性采样；3) 推导解耦梯度估计器，将空间导数表示为解的加权边界积分，无需对梯度递归；4) 采用异方差回归基去噪器进行时空域方差缩减。

Result: 在多种几何构型和空间频率的解析解上验证了方法，确认了预期的蒙特卡洛收敛速率，并在散热器和冷却场景中展示了实际应用能力，支持混合或纯Neumann边界条件。

Conclusion: Walk on Heat Stars成功填补了蒙特卡洛方法在抛物型方程领域的空白，提供了一种无网格、无需全局线性求解的瞬态热传导求解新范式。

Abstract: Monte Carlo methods have proven highly effective for elliptic partial differential equations through algorithms such as Walk on Spheres and Walk on Stars, which evaluate solutions at individual points without volumetric meshing or global linear solves. Extending these methods to the transient regime has remained an open challenge: parabolic equations couple space and time through an anisotropic scaling, requiring joint sampling of spatial displacements and backward time steps whose distribution was not previously available in a unified, exact form.
  We present Walk on Heat Stars, a grid-free Monte Carlo solver that closes this gap by extending the boundary integral framework of Walk on Stars to the parabolic setting. Our method introduces a non-cylindrical boundary integral formulation that accommodates the time-varying domains induced by heat-ball sampling. The heat ball geometry is parameterized by a logarithmic time coordinate and a spatial direction, revealing that the double-layer kernel factorizes into independent Gamma and uniform components. This factorization enables exact directional importance sampling of the recursive next walk position, the Neumann flux contribution, and the volumetric source term.
  We further derive a decoupled gradient estimator that expresses spatial derivatives as weighted boundary integrals of the solution, requiring no recursion on the gradient, and adapt a heteroscedastic regression-based denoiser to the space-time domain for variance reduction. We validate our method on analytical solutions across a range of geometries and spatial frequencies, confirm convergence at the expected Monte Carlo rate, and demonstrate practical applicability on heat sink and cooling scenes with mixed or pure Neumann boundary conditions.

</details>


### [413] [STAR-NT: Spatiotemporal Acceleration of Real-Time Neural Transparency Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16747)
*Grigoris Tsopouridis,Christos Georgiou-Mousses,Aris Panagiotidis,Andreas Vasilakis,David Corrigan,Tobias A. Franke,Aleksei Gorbonosov,Andrei Astapov,Ioannis Fudos*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 针对神经顺序无关透明度渲染在移动端和旧硬件上几何通道与网络输入生成开销大的问题，提出一种利用空间自适应四叉树细分和时序深度重投影的时空加速框架，在保持视觉质量的同时显著降低渲染成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经顺序无关透明度（Neural OIT）能高质量渲染重叠透明表面，但其几何通道和网络输入生成的计算开销很大，尤其在移动端和旧硬件上难以实用，因此需要有效的加速方法。

Method: 提出一个时空加速框架：空间上采用自适应四叉树的屏幕空间细分，根据局部颜色方差动态调整几何通道分辨率；时间上对选定帧通过基于深度的重投影复用前一帧的透明度结果，避免完全重新渲染。

Result: 该方法有效降低了渲染开销，同时保持了视觉质量，并能高效集成到现有实时渲染管线中。

Conclusion: 利用空间和时间上的连续性，通过自适应细分与时序复用，能够在不牺牲图像质量的前提下大幅降低神经顺序无关透明度的计算成本，适用于移动端和旧硬件等受限平台。

Abstract: Neural order-independent transparency delivers high-quality rendering of overlapping transparent surfaces, but its geometry passes and network input generation remain costly, particularly on mobile and legacy hardware. We present a spatiotemporal acceleration framework that exploits spatial and temporal coherence to reduce this overhead while preserving visual quality. Spatially, we use adaptive quadtree-based screen-space subdivision to scale geometry pass resolution according to local color variance. Temporally, selected frames reuse the previous transparency result through depth-based reprojection instead of full rendering. Together, these optimizations reduce rendering cost and integrate efficiently into existing real-time rendering pipelines.

</details>


### [414] [AI+CAD Data Representation Architecture: From AI+CAD Solid Modeling to AI+CAD Industrial-Grade Parametric Feature Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16797)
*Rubin Fan,Fazhi He,Yuxin Liu,Jing Lin,Ruibo Wan,Xuecheng Zhang,Qingchen Kong*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文指出中国95%的研发设计类工业软件依赖进口，高端CAD/CAE/CAM市场90%被欧美垄断。与CV/CG追求"视觉可信"不同，CAD更强调"工业可用性"，数据表示架构比网络算法优化更基础。本文从AI+CAD数据表示出发，分类综述研究进展，以DeepCAD为例分析其与工业级参数化特征建模的差距，再通过WHUCAD的三级架构对比展示其对工业级建模的基础支撑，最后展望AI+工业级CAD的发展方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中国工业软件面临严重的"卡脖子"问题，95%的研发设计类工业软件依赖进口，高端市场被欧美垄断，亟需自主可控的AI+CAD技术突破。同时，现有AI+CAD研究多关注"视觉 plausibility"而忽视"工业可用性"，在数据表示架构层面与工业级参数化特征建模存在显著差距。

Method: 本文采用综述与对比分析方法：首先从数据表示角度对AI+CAD进行分类范式梳理；然后以DeepCAD为例剖析代表性工作的痛点与工业级差距；接着通过WHUCAD三级数据表示架构进行对比，论证其对工业级参数化特征建模的基础支撑作用。

Result: 揭示了当前AI+CAD工作因数据表示架构缺陷而无法满足工业级需求的核心问题，阐明了WHUCAD三级架构相比DeepCAD等方案在支持工业级参数化特征建模方面的根本性优势。

Conclusion: 强调数据表示架构是AI+CAD走向工业级应用的关键瓶颈，WHUCAD的三级架构为突破这一瓶颈提供了基础支撑；在大模型和Agent快速迭代的背景下，AI+工业级CAD的发展需要更加重视数据表示这一底层基础设施。

Abstract: In July 2025, Study Times, sponsored by the Party School of the Central Committee of the CPC, pointed out that 95% of industrial software for R&D and design in China relies on imports, and that 90% of the high-end CAD/CAE/CAM software market is monopolized by European and American giants. This is a typical strategic bottleneck problem. Unlike the visually oriented goal of "visual plausibility" pursued by related sister disciplines such as CV and CG, CAD places greater emphasis on "industrial usability". In CAD, data representation architecture is more foundational than the optimization of network algorithms. This paper first starts from data representation in AI+CAD and reports a classification paradigm and research progress in AI+CAD. Then, using the open-source DeepCAD data representation as an example, it analyzes the pain points of representative AI+CAD work and the gap between such work and real industrial-grade parametric feature modeling. Next, by comparison with the open-source WHUCAD data representation, it discusses how its three-level architecture provides fundamental support for industrial-grade parametric feature modeling. Finally, in view of the rapid iteration of the AI wave, large models, and agents, this paper offers an outlook on AI+industrial-grade CAD.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [415] [Phase-field analysis of fracture in heterogeneous wellbore systems: effects of casing eccentricity and cement-formation interface strength](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16346)
*Tharunsarathy,Wasim Niyaz Munshi,Chandrasekhar Annavarapu,Birendra Jha*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合相场断裂框架，用于模拟存在弱界面的非均质井筒系统中的裂纹扩展。通过数值实验揭示了套管偏心率和界面强度对裂纹萌生压力的显著影响，并展示了三维模拟中特有的深度相关裂纹成核、应力阴影效应及裂纹合并现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测复杂地应力条件下非均质井筒系统中裂纹的萌生与扩展仍然具有挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理弱界面和三维效应。

Method: 提出混合相场断裂框架，先通过基准问题进行验证，再通过数值实验隔离分析界面强度和套管偏心率对裂纹扩展的影响。

Result: 套管偏心率使裂纹萌生压力降低达30%；超过50%临界偏心率时会产生倾斜裂纹；弱界面（强度仅为基体的30%）会偏转径向裂纹，延迟应力松弛并促进更多径向裂纹成核；三维模拟揭示了平面应变假设无法捕捉的深度相关裂纹成核、应力阴影效应及裂纹合并现象。

Conclusion: 该框架能够有效模拟真实非均质井筒系统中的裂纹行为，揭示了二维平面应变假设下无法观测的三维断裂现象，对评估井筒完整性和持续环空压力风险具有重要工程意义。

Abstract: Predicting the initiation and propagation of cracks in heterogeneous wellbore systems under complex in-situ conditions remains challenging. We present a hybrid phase-field fracture framework to model crack growth in heterogeneous wellbore systems with weak interfaces. The framework is first validated against benchmark problems with available analytical and numerical solutions. Subsequently, numerical experiments are conducted to isolate the effects of interface strength and casing eccentricity on crack growth. The results show that casing eccentricity strongly influences both the pressure at crack initiation and the resulting crack paths, reducing the crack initiation pressure by up to 30% relative to the concentric configuration. Beyond a critical eccentricity threshold of 50%, localized shear stresses drive the nucleation of inclined cracks in the formation in addition to radial cracking -- a failure mode absent in concentric configurations. For sufficiently weak interfaces (i.e., interfaces with 30% of the strength of the surrounding bulk material), radially propagating cracks in the cement sheath are deflected along the interface rather than penetrating into the formation. This deflection delays stress relaxation within the sheath, promotes the nucleation of additional radial cracks, and increases the risk of sustained casing pressure and wellbore failure. Finally, a three-dimensional simulation reveals depth-dependent crack nucleation, stress-shadow effects that suppress full-depth crack growth and crack coalescence along the cement-formation interface -- phenomena that are fundamentally inaccessible under plane-strain assumptions - demonstrating the applicability of the framework to realistic heterogeneous wellbore systems.

</details>


### [416] [Bayesian Variational System Identification with Weak-Form Residual Likelihoods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14942)
*Chengyang Huang,Siddhartha Srivastava,Krishna Garikipati,Xun Huan*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯变分系统识别（B-VSI）框架，用于从含噪声的时空数据中识别偏微分方程中的参数化算子，实现了算子选择、参数估计和不确定量化，并在Fokker-Planck和Cahn-Hilliard方程上验证了其准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的变分系统识别（VSI）方法虽然能通过Galerkin弱形式残差识别PDE，但缺乏对噪声的统计建模和不确定量化能力。本文旨在将贝叶斯推断引入VSI框架，实现从含噪数据中鲁棒地识别算子并量化参数与模型形式的不确定性。

Method: 定义弱形式残差空间中的似然函数，通过传播观测不确定性到残差映射中捕获异方差和相关的残差误差；使用滞后协方差更新获得广义最小二乘估计和共轭后验近似，并结合梯度法和粒子法处理更一般的先验和后验结构；通过基于残差空间贝叶斯信息准则的顺序算子消除处理模型形式不确定性。

Result: 在状态线性和非线性PDE（包括Fokker-Planck方程和两场Cahn-Hilliard方程）上的实验表明，B-VSI能从噪声数据中准确恢复活跃算子和系数，相比经典VSI鲁棒性更强，并能提供系数及导出物理量的后验不确定估计。

Conclusion: B-VSI框架为含噪时空数据下的PDE系统识别提供了一种完整的贝叶斯解决方案，兼顾了计算效率（避免反复正演求解）和不确定量化能力，在算子选择、参数估计和鲁棒性方面均优于经典VSI方法。

Abstract: We consider system identification for discovering parameterized operators in governing partial differential equations (PDEs) from noisy spatiotemporal data. Building on variational system identification (VSI), which identifies PDEs through Galerkin weak-form residuals, we develop a Bayesian VSI (B-VSI) framework for operator selection, parameter estimation, and uncertainty quantification. The central idea is to define the likelihood directly in weak-form residual space by propagating observation uncertainty through the weak-form residual map. The resulting likelihood captures heteroscedastic and correlated residual errors while avoiding repeated forward PDE solves during inference. For efficient computation, we use lagged-covariance updates that yield generalized least-squares estimates and conjugate posterior approximations when applicable, together with gradient-based and particle-based methods for more general priors and posterior structures. Model-form uncertainty is handled through sequential operator elimination guided by a residual-space Bayesian information criterion. We demonstrate the framework on state-linear and nonlinear PDEs, including the Fokker--Planck equation and a two-field Cahn--Hilliard equation. The results show that B-VSI accurately recovers active operators and coefficients from noisy data, improves robustness relative to classical VSI, and provides posterior uncertainty estimates for coefficients and derived physical quantities.

</details>


### [417] [Graphical conditional generative modeling for digital twin modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16219)
*Zongren Zou,Théo Bourdais,Ricardo Baptista,Houman Owhadi*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种框架，通过条件生成建模与基于高斯过程的方差分析（核模态分解），从观测数据中发现控制随机代理模型所需的简约变量集——即识别哪些候选输入影响目标变量的完整条件分布（而非仅条件均值），从而解决数字孪生建模中因无限增加复杂度而导致的维护、验证和解释困难问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字孪生建模在模型不确定性下常面临开放保真度问题：增加变量、数据流和时间尺度会无限提高模型复杂度，最终导致系统难以维护、验证、解释以及用于应力或安全测试。因此需要一种能够构建简约随机代理模型的方法。

Method: 将条件生成建模（学习目标在给定候选输入下的条件分布）与基于高斯过程的方差分析（通过核模态分解）相结合，实现非影响输入的迭代剪枝和可解释结构发现。

Result: 在随机动态系统、缺失变量、PDE控制、强化学习和经济数据等多个示例中，所发现的结构能产生可解释的随机代理模型，其下游性能与在完整变量集上训练的模型相当。

Conclusion: 该方法能够识别影响目标变量完整条件分布的输入变量，在控制场景中可解释为学习到的马尔可夫决策过程，同时识别转移模型以及使学习动力学有效马尔可夫化所需的状态、动作和记忆变量。

Abstract: Digital twin modeling, including control and data assimilation under model uncertainty, often faces an open-ended fidelity problem: adding variables, data streams, and time scales can indefinitely increase model complexity, ultimately producing systems that are difficult to maintain, validate, interpret, and use for stress or safety testing. As an alternative, one can seek parsimonious stochastic surrogate models built only on the variables needed to describe the relevant quantities of interest. We introduce a framework for discovering such variables from observational data by identifying which candidate inputs influence the full conditional law of a target quantity, rather than only its conditional mean. This distinction is essential in stochastic, coarse-grained, or partially observed systems, where dependencies may appear through changes in variability, tail behavior, multimodality, or uncertainty rather than through deterministic functional relationships. The framework couples conditional generative modeling, which learns the conditional distribution of the target given candidate inputs, with Gaussian-process-based analysis of variance (through kernel mode decomposition), which enables iterative pruning of non-influential inputs and interpretable structure discovery. In control settings, the resulting surrogate can be interpreted as a learned Markov decision process: the method identifies not only a transition model, but also the state, action, and memory variables needed to make the learned dynamics effectively Markovian. Across examples involving stochastic dynamical systems, missing variables, PDE control, reinforcement learning, and economic data, the discovered structures yield interpretable stochastic surrogates whose downstream performance is comparable to models trained on the full variable set.

</details>


### [418] [The CREATOR Project: Towards a Computational Electric Machine Laboratory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16653)
*Sebastian Schöps,Annette Muetze,Herbert De Gersem,Herbert Egger,Manfred Kaltenbacher*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 德国和奥地利联合资助的TRR 361/F90 CREATOR项目（2022-2030）旨在建立电机仿真驱动设计的新范式，通过整合电气工程、应用数学、流体动力学和材料科学的多学科专业知识，开发集成建模、仿真和优化方法。文章概述了研究愿景、第一资助期（2022-2026）的关键成果以及向计算电机实验室发展的当前进展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统电机设计采用顺序工作流程，难以满足效率、功率密度和可持续性日益增长的需求，亟需集成多物理效应、先进材料和复杂几何形状的新设计范式。

Method: 建立跨学科大型协作项目，整合电气工程、应用数学、流体动力学和材料科学领域的专长，开发集成建模、仿真和优化方法。

Result: 第一资助期（2022-2026）取得关键成果，正计算电机实验室方向发展。

Conclusion: CREATOR项目通过跨学科整合，有望建立电机仿真驱动设计的新范式，应对现代电机设计中的多物理场挑战。

Abstract: The Collaborative Research Centre TRR 361/F90 CREATOR (2022-2030) aims at establishing a new paradigm for the simulation-driven design of electric machines. Increasing demands on efficiency, power density and sustainability require the integration of multiphysical effects, advanced materials and complex geometries into the design process. Traditional sequential workflows are no longer sufficient to address these challenges. CREATOR therefore combines expertise from electrical engineering, applied mathematics, fluid dynamics and materials science to establish integrated modelling, simulation and optimisation methodologies in a single large-scale project funded by the German and Austrian national funding agencies. This article provides an overview of the research vision, key achievements from the first funding period (2022-2026) and current developments towards a computational electric machine laboratory.

</details>


### [419] [High-Fidelity Numerical Modeling for the Mechanical Characterization of a Full-Scale Test Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16291)
*Jacopo Bonari,Max von Danwitz,Alexander Popp*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了在慕尼黑联邦国防军大学建造的全尺寸两跨试验桥的监测活动，并提出了基于物理的高保真数值模型，通过贝叶斯更新实现模型校准，旨在开发功能性的数字孪生体，以支持桥梁结构健康监测和维护决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 桥梁作为交通网络的关键组成部分，面临老龄化、交通量增加和极端天气事件加剧的挑战。可靠的SHM策略至关重要，但损伤状态数据的稀缺是主要障碍。为此，需要一种介于实验室规模实验和实际监测之间的中间步骤，以研究特定结构缺陷和地基沉降等损伤场景。

Method: 在慕尼黑联邦国防军大学设计并建造了一座全尺寸两跨试验桥，针对桥面结构缺陷和地基沉降（与洪水冲刷相关）开展损伤场景监测活动。同时，建立了高保真物理数值模型，并利用运行条件下收集的实验数据，通过贝叶斯更新对模型进行机械特性校准。

Result: 实现了高保真数值模型的建立与校准，模型能够准确评估结构性能，并为不同环境条件和人工损伤场景下的实测响应提供详细的参照基准，为构建功能性数字孪生体奠定了基础。

Conclusion: 该研究开发的数字孪生体作为试验桥的动态数据驱动映射，能够支持明智的维护决策、延长桥梁使用寿命，并为未来应用于真实基础设施的安全评估提供参考。

Abstract: Bridges are vital components of transportation networks, serving as critical lifelines that ensure the safe and efficient movement of people, goods, and emergency services. With aging infrastructures, increasing traffic volumes and loads, and growing impact of extreme weather events driven by climate change, the development of reliable structural health monitoring (SHM) strategies has become of utmost importance. A key challenge in this domain is the scarcity of data on well-characterized damage states. To address this, a monitoring campaign was recently conducted on a full-scale, two-span test bridge specifically designed and built at the University of the Bundeswehr Munich to investigate damage scenarios related to specific structural deficiencies of the deck and to foundations settlement, the latter being connected to failure mechanisms typical in the context of floodings, when scour, i.e., washing out of the foundations, might happen. The test bridge is a crucial intermediate step between laboratory-scale experiments and real-world monitoring. In this study, a high-fidelity, physics-based numerical model of the same structure is presented as a complementary tool. The model enables accurate performances assessment and provides a detailed reference to interpret measured responses under varying environmental conditions and artificial damage scenarios. Experimental data collected under operational conditions were used to refine the model's mechanical characterization through Bayesian updating. The goal is to develop a functional digital twin of the test bridge, acting as a dynamic, data-driven shadow of the physical structure, to support informed maintenance decisions, extend service life, and enhance safety in future studies applied to real-world infrastructures.

</details>


### [420] [Physics-Informed Sensitivity Analysis for Enhanced Structural Health Assessment: Test-Case for a Mixed Steel-Concrete Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16308)
*Jacopo Bonari,Francesca Marsili,Max von Danwitz,Alexander Popp*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 本文针对桥梁结构健康监测（SHM）与灵敏度分析（SA）的集成需求，开发了一座全尺寸两跨钢-混凝土组合试验桥的高保真数值模型，用于模拟真实结构、量化不确定性，并通过SA评估不同工况下结构参数的敏感性，以提升预后能力并构建系统化的评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着桥梁基础设施老化、交通量增长及极端天气事件加剧，亟需开发有效的物理信息驱动的结构健康监测框架；结合灵敏度分析能够识别对结构响应最具影响力的参数，从而提升监测和评估的精准性。

Method: 基于物理信息构建全尺寸两跨钢-混凝土组合试验桥的高保真数值模型，作为真实结构的虚拟副本；在该模型上进行灵敏度分析，评估不同机械工况下的结构响应，并将SHM与SA结合形成系统化评估框架。

Result: 建立了高保真数值模型，能够作为真实结构的虚拟副本提升预后能力并量化不确定性；通过SA识别了不同工况下对结构响应影响最大的关键参数。

Conclusion: 高保真数值模型结合灵敏度分析是提升桥梁结构健康监测系统预测能力和不确定性量化水平的有效手段，为构建集成化系统评估框架提供了基础。

Abstract: Bridges are vital components of transportation systems, that serve as essential links ensuring the safe and efficient movement of people, goods, and emergency responders, especially during crises. With aging infrastructures, increasing traffic volumes and loads, and the intensifying impacts of extreme weather events due to climate change, the development of effective physics-informed structural health monitoring (SHM) frameworks has become critically important, more so when combined with sensitivity analysis (SA), which identifies the most influential structural parameters in the bridge's response. To support this, a high-fidelity, physics-based numerical model of a full-scale, two-span, mixed steel-concrete test bridge has been developed. This model serves as a virtual replica of a real structure located at the University of the Bundeswehr Munich. The numerical model is used as a complementary tool to improve prognostic capabilities and quantify uncertainty. A SA study is conducted to evaluate the structure's response under various mechanical conditions. Assessing these operational variations' effects on structural behavior forms part of an integrated, systematic evaluation framework aimed at combining SHM and SA.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [421] [Competitive Equilibrium in Labor Economies through the Lens of Goods and Chores Fisher Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15060)
*Bhaskar Ray Chaudhury,Christian Kroer,Ruta Mehta,Tianlong Nan,Zongjun Yang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出一个统一了经典Fisher商品市场和Fisher坏品市场的双边劳动力市场模型，证明了竞争均衡的存在性与福利定理，并在线性偏好下给出了多个多项式时间均衡计算算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将商品市场和坏品市场统一到一个双边劳动力市场框架中，该市场中任务对用户是商品、对工人是负担，研究其竞争均衡的存在性、福利性质及计算问题。

Method: (1) 建立双边劳动力市场的CE模型，证明均衡存在性及第一、第二福利定理；(2) 在线性偏好下，将均衡刻画为非凸Eisenberg-Gale型KKT点；(3) 设计基于Walrasian价格更新的组合算法（CEEI情形下强多项式时间）；(4) 通过变量替换将非凸规划转化为线性规划（含无理系数），并给出另一种多项式时间算法。

Result: (1) 一般设定下市场保证存在竞争均衡，且福利定理成立；(2) 线性偏好下存在多项式时间组合算法；(3) CEEI情形下算法为强多项式时间；(4) 通过变量替换得到了线性规划形式（含无理系数），并给出处理无理系数的多项式算法。

Conclusion: 双边劳动力市场具有坚实的均衡理论基础和高效的计算方法；即便在纯商品Fisher市场中尚未实现的LP刻画，在此模型中得以建立。

Abstract: In this paper, we study a two-sided labor market that couples the classical Fisher market with goods and the Fisher market with bads into a single unified framework. In our model, users demand tasks in order to derive utility, while workers supply labor to perform these tasks in exchange for earnings. Each task thus plays a dual role: it is a good for the user side of the market and a chore for the worker side. Given prices for tasks, users choose utility-maximizing bundles subject to budgets, while workers choose disutility-minimizing task bundles subject to earning requirements; the resulting choices induce demand and supply endogenously for each task, and a CE corresponds to prices at which these coincide. We show that such markets are guaranteed to admit a CE in a very general setting, and the first and second welfare theorems hold for our labor market model.
  We next study the computation of equilibria under linear preferences. We show that, similar to the chores setting, equilibria correspond to KKT points of an Eisenberg-Gale-like non-convex program. Despite the non-convex characterization, we go on to show a set of surprisingly positive results. First, we show that there exists a polynomial-time combinatorial algorithm for computing CE, which relies on a natural Walrasian scheme for updating prices. In the "CEEI-like" case, this yields a strongly polynomial-time algorithm. We next show that our market admits a natural dual program, and this non-convex labor-market program admits a change of variables that transforms it into a linear program (albeit with irrational coefficients). Finally, leveraging this LP, we give yet another polynomial-time algorithm while deriving an approach for addressing the irrational coefficients in an efficient manner. We note that, even for goods-only linear Fisher markets, obtaining such an LP formulation remains open.

</details>


### [422] [Self-Driving Negotiator: An interactive, verifiable benchmark for social negotiation and theory of mind under hidden intent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15139)
*Ashutosh Kumar*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出Self-Driving Negotiator，一个纯文本、多轮、程序化生成的自动驾驶社交协商环境，用于衡量驾驶中的隐性社会协调能力。实验表明当前模型远不及脚本专家，最佳平均成功率仅0.68，且在争议性并道场景中模型表现统计上无差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶语言基准多聚焦于感知、视觉问答或开环规划，而语言智能体协商基准通常将协商显式化为文本。两者之间存在空白：缺乏能够衡量驾驶中隐性社交协商（如推断意图、隐式协调）能力的评估环境。

Method: 构建纯文本、多轮、程序化生成的驾驶协商环境。智能体生成具体驾驶动作，奖励和诊断指标从特权模拟器状态计算（而非模型解释）。设计了anti-gaming不变性机制，包含多个验证场景和难度层级。

Result: 当前模型远不及脚本专家水平。最佳平均成功率0.68；争议性并道场景中模型表现统计上平坦（无显著差异）；难度层级能区分线索跟随行为与真正的等待承诺行为。

Conclusion: 现有语言模型在自动驾驶隐性社交协商任务上与脚本专家差距显著，尤其是复杂场景下模型缺乏真正的等待承诺能力，说明该方向仍需大量改进。

Abstract: Autonomous driving is full of tiny social negotiations: a driver presses forward, another yields, a pedestrian fakes toward the curb, or a lane vehicle chooses whether to open a merge gap. Such interactions require inferring hidden intent from behavior under partial observability and then acting safely and efficiently. Existing autonomous-driving language benchmarks mostly focus on perception, visual question answering, or open-loop planning, while existing language-agent negotiation benchmarks typically make the negotiation explicit in text. Self-Driving Negotiator bridges the gap between the two: a text-only, multi-turn, procedurally generated environment for measuring implicit social coordination in driving. Agents generate specific driving actions. Reward and diagnostics are computed from the privileged simulator state, not from the explanation of the model. This report covers task design, reward and anti-gaming invariants, validated scenarios, non-LLM baselines, and a six-model inference leaderboard. Current models are far removed from the scripted expert. The best average success rate across three scenarios is 0.68; contested merge is statistically flat across models; and difficulty tiers separate cue-following from true wait-for-commitment behavior.

</details>


### [423] [Competitive Analysis for Online Fair Division under Multiple Fairness Notions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15404)
*Tianqi Chen,Zhiyi Tan*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在线公平分配不可分割物品的问题，物品顺序到达且必须立即分配。针对不同公平性概念，设计在线算法并采用竞争比衡量性能，涵盖商品/家务、标准化/非标准化效用、相同/一般效用等多种模型，解决多数未决问题并证明算法最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线环境中物品顺序到达且不可撤销，传统离线公平分配算法无法直接应用，亟需设计能在在线场景下保证公平性或近似公平性的分配机制。

Method: 采用竞争比作为性能度量指标，即在线算法与拥有未来全部信息的离线最优算法在公平性保证上的最坏情况比率。系统性地考虑了商品与家务、标准化与非标准化效用、相同与一般效用函数等不同模型设置。

Result: 针对大多数未解决的模型案例，设计了在线算法或证明了在线算法所能达到的竞争比的理论上限，且多数算法被证明是最优的。

Conclusion: 为在线公平分配不可分割物品问题提供了系统的算法框架与理论界限，填补了该领域多数空白，且所提算法在理论上达到了最优性能。

Abstract: We study the online fair division of indivisible items with additive utilities, where items arrive sequentially and must be irrevocably allocated upon arrival. Considering various fairness notions, we focus on designing online algorithms that produce fair or approximately fair allocations for any instance. We measure algorithm performance using the competitive ratio, defined as the worst-case ratio between the fairness guarantee achieved by the online algorithm and that of an optimal offline allocation with full knowledge of future arrivals. We examine a broad spectrum of models, including the allocation of goods or chores, normalized versus non-normalized utilities, and identical versus general utility functions. We address the majority of the unresolved cases by providing online algorithms or proving the limits of the competitive ratio achievable by online algorithms. In most cases, the algorithms are shown to be optimal.

</details>


### [424] [On Type Deception in Linear-Quadratic Differential Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15435)
*Jesse Milzman,Dipankar Maity*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究不完全信息线性二次微分博弈，其中一方拥有初始未知的私人类型。知情方有隐藏类型的动机，而不知情方可在博弈中推断类型。任何事前均衡都会分解为欺骗性 pooling 阶段和完全信息 revelatory 阶段。通过嵌套Riccati方程求解两个阶段，并通过标量揭示时间最大化博弈值来寻找候选均衡。在时变控制优势的追逃博弈中验证了欺骗具有可量化的事前价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究不完全信息下线性二次微分博弈中，知情方隐藏类型（欺骗）与不知情方推断类型之间的战略互动，量化欺骗的事前价值。

Method: 将均衡分解为欺骗性pooling阶段和完全信息revelatory阶段，通过嵌套Riccati方程求解；通过标量揭示时间最大化博弈值寻找候选均衡，对时齐系统矩阵提供梯度。

Result: 在时变控制优势的追逃博弈中，发现内部最优揭示时间，确认欺骗具有可量化的事前价值。

Conclusion: 提出了求解不完全信息线性二次微分博弈的框架，证明了欺骗在事前具有可量化的价值。

Abstract: We consider two-player linear-quadratic differential games of incomplete information, in which one player has a private type initially unknown to the other. The typed player has incentive to conceal their type, while the uninformed player has the potential to infer it during play. Any ex-ante equilibrium in this setting will decompose into a deceptive, pooling phase, and a complete-information, revelatory phase. We demonstrate how to solve both phases via nested Riccati equations. Candidate equilibria are then found by maximizing the game value over a scalar revelation time, for which we provide a gradient in the case of time-homogeneous system matrices. We conclude by demonstrating our framework in a pursuit-evasion game with time-varying control advantages, finding interior optimal revelation times that confirm deception has quantifiable ex-ante value.

</details>


### [425] [The Computational Complexity of Team Zero-Sum Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16139)
*Ioannis Anagnostides,Ioannis Panageas,Tuomas Sandholm,Jingming Yan*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明团队零和博弈中计算纳什均衡是 PPAD-完全的，即使每方只有两个玩家、精度为反多项式或博弈类型为多矩阵博弈，该问题仍然困难。作为副产品，解决了群组零和多矩阵博弈的复杂度，并证明在二次（多线性）目标函数中计算一阶驻点也是 PPAD-完全的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 团队零和博弈是两人零和博弈与势博弈的自然推广，在众多实际应用中（每方由多个独立但共享目标的智能体组成）具有重要价值。然而，其计算复杂度尚未解决，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 开发了一系列团队零和博弈的"小工具"（gadgets），用于模拟 Bernasconi 和 Castiglioni（STOC '26）的突破性归约；对于二次目标函数的困难性，采用了线性局部逼近的通用技术。

Result: 团队零和博弈计算纳什均衡是 PPAD-完全的，即使精度为反多项式（排除 FPTAS，除非 P=PPAD）、每队仅两名玩家、博弈类型为多矩阵博弈；群组零和多矩阵博弈的复杂度被解决；二次（多线性）min-max 优化的一阶驻点计算也是 PPAD-完全的。

Conclusion: 尽管存在全局对抗结构，团队零和博弈与一般和博弈一样困难，即算法上不可处理（在 PPAD 意义下）。

Abstract: A celebrated consequence of the minimax theorem is that two-player zero-sum games admit a tractable equilibrium characterization. In many central applications, however, each side comprises multiple independent agents who share a common objective but cannot perfectly coordinate their actions. Such settings can be modeled as \emph{team zero-sum games}, a natural generalization of both two-player zero-sum games and potential games -- the two most well-studied classes of games in algorithmic game theory.
  In this paper, we settle the complexity of team zero-sum games by establishing that computing Nash equilibria is \PPAD-complete. As a result, despite the global adversarial structure, team zero-sum games are as hard as general-sum games. Our hardness result holds even when i) the precision is inverse polynomial, thereby ruling out a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (unless $¶= \PPAD$); ii) each team consists of only two players; and iii) the underlying class of games is polymatrix. As a byproduct, we resolve the complexity of group-wise zero-sum polymatrix games, a class introduced and examined in the seminal work of Cai and Daskalakis (SODA '11), and more recently highlighted by Hollender, Maystre, and Nagarajan (ICLR '25). Moreover, we show that computing a first-order stationary point in min-max optimization is \PPAD-complete even for quadratic (multilinear) objectives.
  From a technical standpoint, we develop a series of team zero-sum game gadgets that allow us to simulate the breakthrough reduction of Bernasconi and Castiglioni (STOC '26). Moreover, to obtain hardness results for quadratic objectives, we make use of a general technique based on linear local approximation, which is of independent interest.

</details>


### [426] [EconCSLib: A Lean Library for Computational Economics and AI-Assisted Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16144)
*Xiaohui Bei,Jiajun Ma,Zhan Jing,Hongfei Fu,Zhihao Gavin Tang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文介绍了EconCSLib，一个基于Lean 4的计算经济学形式化库，旨在为博弈论、机制设计、社会选择等领域提供可复用的定义和定理，并探讨了AI辅助形式化的经验与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用交互式定理证明器（如Lean）将非形式化的数学表述转化为机器可验证的工件，mathlib的成功展示了这一路径的潜力。然而，计算经济学领域尚缺乏系统化的形式化基础设施，同时AI辅助编程和定理证明的进展使得大规模形式化更加可行，亟需在该领域建立形式化库并探索AI辅助的最佳实践。

Method: 构建EconCSLib库：基于Lean 4，遵循模块化设计原则，提供博弈论、机制设计、社会选择等领域的可重用定义与定理；不仅验证已有结果，还纳入机器可检查的开放问题与前沿研究论文的形式化；将AI辅助工具融入开发流程作为案例研究。

Result: 成功建立了EconCSLib形式化库，总结了开发过程中的设计原则与经验教训，展示了AI辅助形式化在计算经济学领域的可行性与潜力。

Conclusion: EconCSLib为计算经济学的形式化提供了基础设施和案例研究，AI辅助形式化有望显著降低大规模形式化的门槛，未来可进一步扩展到更广泛的经济学理论验证和开放问题探索。

Abstract: Mathematical formalization uses interactive theorem provers to turn informal mathematical statements into machine-checkable artifacts. The success of mathlib, a large collaborative library for Lean, illustrates the potential of this approach. Recent progress in AI-assisted programming and theorem proving is also making large-scale formalization more practical.
