This paper presents EconCSLib, an early Lean 4 library for computational economics, as both infrastructure and a case study for AI-assisted formalization. The library aims to provide reusable definitions and theorems for game theory, mechanism design, social choice, and related areas. Beyond verified proofs of existing results, the library also aims to host machine-checked open problems and formalization of modern research papers. We discuss the design principles behind the library, the lessons learned from its development, and future directions for AI-assisted formalization in computational economics.

</details>


### [427] [When do Mixed-Integer Games Admit Rational Equilibria?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16311)
*Aloïs Duguet,Tobias Harks,Martin Schmidt,Julian Schwarz*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了混合整数线性二次广义纳什均衡问题，并完全解决了四类子博弈中理性均衡的存在性问题。结果表明，只有当博弈不含玩家二次项且不依赖对手约束时，才存在理性均衡；其余三类博弈若存在均衡，则仅包含非理性均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在混合整数线性二次广义纳什均衡问题中，探究在有理输入数据下，是否存在有理数形式的均衡解，以明确该类博弈中理性均衡的存在性边界。

Method: 根据目标函数中是否存在玩家二次项以及约束是否依赖对手策略，将博弈划分为四个子类，分别分析各子类中理性均衡的存在性，并通过构造反例证明某些子类仅存在非理性均衡。

Result: 完全解决了所有四个子类的理性均衡问题：仅有那些不含玩家二次项且不依赖对手约束的博弈（即玩家线性博弈）在存在均衡时能保证有理均衡；其余三个子类均包含仅存在非理性均衡的实例。

Conclusion: 混合整数线性二次广义纳什均衡问题中，理性均衡的存在性严格依赖于目标函数中玩家二次项和约束中对手依赖性的缺失；一旦引入这些要素，即使存在均衡，也只能是非理性的。

Abstract: We consider mixed-integer linear-quadratic generalized Nash equilibrium problems, i.e., games in which each player solves a mixed-integer program subject to linear constraints in her own and rivals' strategies as well as an objective which is quadratic in her own strategies and bilinear in her own and rivals' strategies. For this class of games, we study the question of the existence of rational equilibria assuming rational input data. We distinguish four subclasses according to the presence of player-quadratic terms in the objective and rival-dependent constraints. As our main result, we completely settle the rationality question for all four subclasses, i.e., we show that only player-linear games without player-quadratic terms and without rival-dependent constraints admit rational equilibria -- if the game admits equilibria at all. All other three classes contain instances with irrational equilibria only.

</details>


### [428] [Gaming-Resistant Insurance Contracts for Autonomous AI Agents: Strategy-Proof Toll Mechanism Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16326)
*Hao-Hsuan Chen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文在Paper A的精算运行时基础上，将运营商视为策略性主体，刻画了AI自主代理保险合同的五类攻击空间，并提出了新的合约条款（共域控制聚合、接口合规处罚、模型身份菜单）以实现激励兼容，最终构建了一个激励兼容层来管理自主代理的副作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Paper A将运营商视为被动主体，但现实中运营商是策略性的，可能利用合约漏洞谋利。本文旨在将运营商策略性纳入模型，分析攻击空间并设计合约条款以抵御这些攻击。

Method: 1) 刻画五类攻击空间；2) 证明Paper A的精算运行时在两类攻击（事后安全默认选择、边界内动作分裂）下具备抗博弈性；3) 提出三个新合约条款：共域控制聚合、接口合规定理（含升级费用）、模型身份菜单（含分量最小惩罚）；4) 将这些条款与Paper A的运行时保证组合，证明五类攻击空间上的联合激励兼容性；5) 设计双参数保费族以实现运营商个体理性与弱预算平衡。

Result: Paper A已覆盖两类攻击（事后安全默认选择、边界内动作分裂）。新条款覆盖剩余三类：共域控制聚合阻止跨边界重路由降费；接口合规定理使无效JSON等故障不被视为零收费安全默认；模型身份菜单使真实报告部署模型成为弱占优策略。组合后实现五类攻击空间上的激励兼容。双参数保费族在真实均衡下满足运营商个体理性与弱预算平衡。

Conclusion: 本文为自主代理副作用的精算控制提供了一个激励兼容层，在运营商策略性行为下仍能维持合约的激励兼容性。

Abstract: Paper A defines a time-consistent actuarial runtime that prices each side-effect-bearing action against a contractually fixed safe default and gates execution against a reserve budget. It treats the operator as passive. This paper makes the operator strategic. We characterise a five-attack space for autonomous AI-agent insurance contracts and prove when the actuarial runtime is gaming-resistant. Two attack surfaces -- post-toll safe-default selection and within-boundary action splitting -- are closed by Paper A's minimal-authority and no-splitting clauses. The remaining three require new contract clauses. First, common-control aggregation prevents cross-boundary re-routing from reducing toll below the boundary potential applied to total exposure. Second, interface failures such as invalid JSON are contract-relevant events, not safety wins: treating them as zero-toll safe defaults can reward unreliable models, while escalation fees reverse the incentive. We validate this interface-compliance theorem on committed cross-model traces from the companion empirical paper. Third, a model-identity menu with a componentwise-minimum penalty schedule makes truthful reporting of the deployed model weakly dominant. We then compose these clauses with Paper A's runtime guarantees to obtain joint incentive compatibility over the five-attack space. Finally, a two-parameter premium family discharges operator individual rationality and weak budget balance at the truthful equilibrium. The result is an incentive-compatibility layer for actuarial control of autonomous-agent side effects.

</details>


### [429] [Game-Theoretic Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Swarm Trajectory Planning in Low-Altitude Wireless Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16386)
*Nguyen Duc Minh Quang,Ruoxi Chong,Zhiqiang Wei,Chang Liu,Derrick Wing Kwan Ng*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对低空经济中多小区蜂窝网联无人机系统的资源分配与轨迹规划耦合问题，提出了一种基于CTDE-MAPPO的协同随机拥塞博弈方法，在5G NR多小区环境下联合优化通信吞吐量与任务完成效率，仿真验证了该方法在聚合效用和任务成功率上优于QMIX、独立Q学习等基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低空经济的快速发展带来了大规模蜂窝网联无人机部署需求，现有研究忽略了多小区环境下无人机轨迹之间因共享无线资源（RB）导致的强策略耦合，且多集中于单小区场景，缺乏对多小区拥塞感知的无人机轨迹规划问题的充分研究。

Method: 将问题建模为协同随机拥塞博弈，设计通信与任务感知的效用函数，提出中心化训练-分布式执行的多智能体近端策略优化（CTDE-MAPPO）算法来最大化多小区RB拥塞下的社会福利。

Result: 该算法在聚合效用和任务成功率上均优于QMIX、独立Q学习和随机基线，并在实际训练预算内实现稳定收敛。

Conclusion: 所提CTDE-MAPPO方法有效解决了多小区蜂窝网联无人机系统中的资源拥塞与轨迹规划耦合问题，为低空经济中的大规模无人机部署提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: The Low-Altitude Economy (LAE) is rapidly expanding, giving rise to low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs), where large-scale cellular-connected unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) deployments support heterogeneous mission-critical applications over multi-cell ground base station (GBS) infrastructures. To ensure mission success, each UAV must jointly optimize communication throughput and mission completion efficiency. In fifth-generation (5G) new radio (NR) systems, the equal resource block (RB) allocation policy induces strong strategic coupling among UAV trajectories: when a UAV enters a GBS cell, it reduces the RB share available to all co-served UAVs, thereby altering their achievable rates and trajectory incentives through shared wireless resources. Existing studies either ignore this coupling or focus on single-cell infrastructure, leaving the multi-cell, congestion-aware UAV trajectory planning problem insufficiently addressed. To fill this gap, we formulate the problem as a cooperative stochastic congestion game with a communication-and-mission-aware utility function, and propose a centralized-training decentralized-execution multi-agent proximal policy optimization (CTDE-MAPPO) algorithm to maximize social welfare under multi-cell RB congestion. Simulation results show that the proposed method outperforms QMIX, independent Q-learning, and random baselines in terms of aggregate utility and mission success rate, while achieving stable convergence within practical training budgets.

</details>


### [430] [An empirical study of Fictitious Play for estimating Nash equilibria in first-price auctions with correlated values](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16389)
*Benjamin Heymann,Panayotis Mertikopoulos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究具有关联价值的一级价格拍卖的纳什均衡计算问题。由于竞标者价值之间的关联性使现有方法失效，作者采用虚拟博弈算法并在大量实例中观察到令人惊讶的良好数值收敛性，从而将[39]的见解扩展到关联价值环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有拍卖均衡计算方法主要适用于独立价值情形，而关联价值带来的复杂性使这些方法不令人满意，因此需要新的计算方法来填补这一空白。

Method: 采用虚拟博弈（Fictitious Play）算法，在大量实例上进行数值实验，检验其向ε-均衡的收敛性。

Result: 虚拟博弈在广泛实例中表现出令人惊讶的良好数值收敛性，能够收敛到ε-均衡。

Conclusion: 这些初步结果将[39]的见解扩展到关联价值环境，并呼吁进一步研究虚拟博弈算法在一级价格拍卖中的性质。

Abstract: This study concerns the computation of the Nash equilibria of first-price auctions with correlated values. Although some equilibrium computation methods exist for auctions with independent values, the correlation of bidders' values introduces significant complications that render the existing methods unsatisfactory. Our empirical contribution is a step towards filling this gap. We report surprisingly good numerical convergence of Fictitious Play toward an $\varepsilon$-equilibrium for an extensive set of instances. By doing so, we extend the insights of [39] to the correlated setting. These preliminary results call for further investigations into the properties of fictitious play algorithms on first-price auctions.  1. since the context is clear, we will use the term Nash equilibrium, or just equilibrium in this article

</details>


### [431] [Fair Division by Contribution: A Shapley Value Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16743)
*Xiaohui Bei,Pinyan Lu,Xiaowei Wu,Shengwei Zhou*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Shapley价值公平性（SVF）的新公平性概念，用于无可转让支付的不可分割物品分配问题。SVF将代理人的应得权益解释为其对社会福利最优化的期望边际贡献，并以福利最大化博弈的Shapley值作为公平基准。文章分析了SVF的近似可实现性，推导了在不同估值函数下的紧界近似比，并提出了高效的高概率近似算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源分配问题中，代理人的估值往往反映其从资源中产生的价值（如生产率、效率或技术），而非主观偏好。传统的公平性概念（如比例性或无嫉妒性）无法反映代理人异质性贡献对集体结果的差异。因此需要一种能够将贡献与公平有机结合的规范性框架。

Method: 引入Shapley价值公平性（SVF），将每个代理人的权利定义为其在最优社会福利中的期望边际贡献（即Shapley值）。通过最坏情况分析推导近似比：对一般凹估值函数给出紧界Θ(ln n)；对有界需求的上限凹估值改进为Θ(ln D)；对线性估值进一步细化为Θ(min{k, ln γ, ln n})。同时提出基于采样的高效近似算法。

Result: 建立了SVF在不同估值函数下的渐近紧界：一般凹估值为Θ(ln n)；有界需求上限凹估值为Θ(ln D)；线性估值为Θ(min{k, ln γ, ln n})。并证明可高效（高概率）计算近优近似分配。

Conclusion: SVF为基于贡献的资源分配提供了一个连接公平与效率的自然桥梁。虽然精确实现Shapley值在无转移支付下不可行，但本文给出了各种情况下可达到的最佳近似比，验证了SVF的理论价值与实用可行性。

Abstract: In many resource allocation problems, agents' valuations are best interpreted not as subjective preferences, but as the value they generate from receiving resources. Such valuations capture productivity, effectiveness, or technology, and may differ significantly across agents. In these settings, classical fairness notions such as proportionality or envy-freeness fail to reflect agents' heterogeneous contributions to the collective outcome. Motivated by this perspective, we introduce \emph{Shapley Value Fairness (SVF)} for the allocation of divisible goods without monetary transfers. SVF interprets an agent's entitlement as her expected marginal contribution to optimal social welfare, and uses the Shapley value of the associated welfare maximization game as a normative fairness benchmark. We position SVF relative to existing fairness notions and show that it provides a natural bridge between fairness and efficiency in contribution-based environments.
  Since exact implementation of the Shapley value is generally infeasible without transfers, SVF naturally leads to the problem of finding allocations that approximate this benchmark as well as possible. We provide a systematic worst-case analysis of the achievable Shapley approximation ratio. For general concave valuations, we establish a tight $Θ(\ln n)$ bound. For capped concave valuations with bounded demands, this bound improves to $Θ(\ln D)$, where $D$ is the maximum aggregate demand for any item. For linear valuations, we further refine the bound to $Θ(\min\{k, \ln γ, \ln n\})$ in terms of the number of agent types $k$ and the value fluctuation ratio $γ$, and show that all bounds are asymptotically tight. Regarding per-instance guarantees, we show that a near-optimal approximation allocation can be computed efficiently (with high probability) via sampling for general concave valuations.

</details>


### [432] [Verification of Stochastic Dominance Envy-Freeness in Time Proportional to Input Size](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16816)
*Kui-Wang Choi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在不可分割物品公平分配中验证随机占优无嫉妒（SD-EF）及其松弛版本SD-EF1的时间最优算法，通过单遍前缀支配检查和惰性初始化，将验证复杂度从已知的O(n²m)降低到O(nm)，相对于输入规模达到了渐进最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的SD-EF/EF1验证算法复杂度为O(n²m)，无法达到线性时间复杂度，需要更高效的验证方法。

Method: 采用单遍前缀支配检查（single-pass prefix-dominance check）和惰性初始化（lazy-initialization）技术，每个智能体仅需一次扫描即可完成验证。

Result: 验证复杂度从O(n²m)降低至O(nm)，达到输入规模的渐进最优。

Conclusion: 鉴于偏好矩阵大小为nm，该算法在输入规模意义上是渐进最优的。

Abstract: We present a time-optimal algorithm for verifying Stochastic Dominance Envy-Freeness (SD-EF) and its relaxation, SD-EF up to one good (SD-EF1), in the fair division of indivisible goods. By leveraging a single-pass prefix-dominance check per agent and lazy-initialization, we reduce the verification complexity from the previously known $\mathcal{O}(n^2m)$ by Aziz (2016) to $\mathcal{O}(nm)$. Given that the input preference matrix is of size $nm$, our algorithm is asymptotically optimal with respect to the input size.

</details>


### [433] [Stable Menus of Public Goods: AI-Enabled Progress](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16989)
*Sara Fish*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文以EC 2025论文"Stable Menus of Public Goods"中的开放问题为实验平台，研究了三种AI经济学研究流程的有效性：提供人类直觉提示、自动多轮交互、以及LLM与一年级博士生的表现对比。发现人类直觉提示有助于LLM产生更好的"品味"；多轮工作流在鼓励"雄心勃勃"步骤时有效；LLM表现略逊于一年级博士生。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同AI辅助经济学计算机科学研究工作流的有效性，具体包括人类直觉提示、多轮交互以及LLM与人类研究者的能力对比。

Method: 以EC 2025论文中的开放问题为实验床，设计三组对照实验：(1)有/无人类直觉提示的LLM表现对比；(2)单轮/多轮交互工作流对比；(3)LLM与一年级博士生（基于未发表手稿）的效果对比。

Result: (1)人类直觉提示可提升LLM的"品味"（即研究方向的选择质量）；(2)多轮工作流在流程鼓励"雄心勃勃"步骤时效果更佳；(3)LLM表现略差于一年级博士生。

Conclusion: 提出了针对AI辅助经济学研究的工作流建议，并指出当前LLM在解决研究型开放问题上的能力仍不及人类初级研究者。

Abstract: Using an open problem from the EC 2025 paper "Stable Menus of Public Goods" as a testbed, we conduct experiments to understand the effectiveness of different AI-for-EconCS research workflows. Specifically, we study three questions: Does providing human intuition in the prompt help? Does automated multi-turn interaction help? And, does an LLM outperform a first-year PhD student? Regarding the first two questions, we provide evidence for the following workflow suggestions: (1) prompting with human intuition can encourage the LLM to have better "taste", (2) multi-turn workflows help when the pipeline encourages "ambitious" steps. Regarding the third question, using an unpublished manuscript written by the paper's senior authors prior to collaborating with the first-year PhD student, we compare the effectiveness of the LLM with that of the first-year PhD student, and find that the LLM is slightly less effective.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [434] [Joint 3D Trajectory Design and Resource Allocation for Secure Dual-UAV-aided Underlay Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15042)
*Hongjiang Lei,Xiaqiu Wu,Ki-Hong Park,Gaojie Chen,Gaofeng Pan*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究双无人机辅助的安全底层数据采集系统，通过联合优化无人机三维轨迹、干扰功率、地面设备发射功率和用户调度，最大化平均保密频谱效率。采用块坐标下降和连续凸逼近方法将非凸问题分解为凸子问题求解，数值结果验证了所提方法的有效性，特别是三维轨迹设计显著提升了系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机因其高机动性和易部署性被广泛用于数据采集任务，但存在空中窃听者的安全威胁。现有研究大多忽略三维轨迹优化或仅考虑理想化的窃听模型，本文旨在设计一种安全的双无人机辅助底层数据采集系统，以应对空中窃听者。

Method: 首先利用期望频谱效率的近似下界简化求解过程；然后采用块坐标下降法将原始非凸优化问题分解为四个子问题；通过引入松弛变量和连续凸逼近方法将各子问题转化为可管理的凸优化任务；联合优化无人机三维轨迹、地面设备发射功率和用户调度。

Result: 数值结果验证了所提方法的有效性，表明无人机三维轨迹设计能够显著提升系统的平均保密频谱效率。

Conclusion: 本文提出的联合优化框架有效解决了存在空中窃听者时双无人机辅助底层数据采集系统的安全性问题，三维轨迹优化是提升系统保密性能的关键因素。

Abstract: Uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly being employed for data collection tasks, thanks to their high mobility and easy deployment, acting as aerial platforms to collect data from ground devices (GDs). This study considers a secure underlay data collection system assisted by dual UAVs and focuses on the joint design of the UAVs' three-dimensional (3D) flight paths, the power of the jamming UAV, the power of GDs, and the scheduling of the underlay GDs in the context of an aerial eavesdropper. The highly coupled objective function and non-convex constraints make the formulated problem more complicated to solve. We first utilize an approximate lower bound on the expected spectral efficiency to streamline the solution process. The average secrecy spectral efficiency (ASSE) is maximized by jointly designing the 3D trajectory of the UAVs, the transmit power of GDs, and the user scheduling. The optimization problem is decomposed into four subproblems using block coordinate descent, with each of them into manageable convex optimization tasks by incorporating slack variables and employing successive convex approximation methods. The numerical results validate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, demonstrating that the design of UAV 3D trajectories remarkably improves the ASSE of the considered system.

</details>


### [435] [Two-Timescale Design for Downlink Multiuser Transmission with Dynamic Metasurface Antennas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15183)
*Hao Xu,Angel Lozano,Hongwen Yang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于动态超表面天线（DMA）下行多用户传输的双时间尺度设计方案，在帧起始阶段基于统计信道状态信息优化DMA系数，在帧内时隙基于降维瞬时信道状态信息更新数字预编码器，平衡了导频开销、复杂度和频谱效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DMA有望降低大规模MIMO架构的高能耗和硬件成本，但需要设计高效的传输方案以平衡导频开销、复杂度和频谱效率。

Method: 提出双时间尺度设计：1）长时间尺度：基于统计CSI优化DMA系数，采用优于随机逐次凸逼近的优化框架；2）短时间尺度：基于优化后的DMA系数和低维瞬时CSI，采用加权最小均方误差方法更新数字预编码器，单用户场景给出闭式解。

Result: 所提出的优化框架优于广泛使用的随机逐次凸逼近方法；双时间尺度设计在性能评估中展现出作为未来无线网络关键技术的潜力。

Conclusion: 双时间尺度DMA设计能有效平衡导频开销与性能，是未来无线网络有吸引力的技术方案。

Abstract: Dynamic metasurface antennas (DMAs) promise to relieve massive multiple-input multiple-output architectures from their high energy consumption and hardware costs. This paper proposes a two-timescale design for downlink multiuser transmission via DMAs, a design that balances pilot overhead, complexity, and spectral efficiency. At the onset of each frame, the DMA coefficients are configured based only on statistical channel-state information (CSI), a process for which the paper introduces an optimization framework that is shown to outperform the widely used stochastic successive convex approximation method. Then, within each frame, the digital precoder is updated at each slot, based on the optimized DMA coefficients and the effective lower-dimensional instantaneous CSI. The weighted minimum mean-squared error method is applied for this short-term optimization and, for the special case of single-user transmission, a closed-form solution for the digital precoder is provided. Performance evaluations demonstrate that the proposed two-timescale design can be an attractive ingredient for future wireless networks.

</details>


### [436] [New bounds for covering codes under insertions or deletions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15379)
*Chengfei Xie,Yubo Sun,Gennian Ge*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究了插入和删除操作下的覆盖码，与汉明度量下的经典情况有显著不同。主要贡献包括：证明插入覆盖与删除覆盖不等价；建立了插入和删除覆盖码的界与构造；利用差分VT码构造了渐近最优的非二元单删覆盖码；证明了二元差分VT码是二突发删除下的完美码；并将构造推广到非二元字母表上的二突发删除覆盖码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同步错误的覆盖码在汉明度量下与经典覆盖码存在本质差异，而插入和删除操作下的覆盖码尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 利用组合方法、超图覆盖理论、差分VT码以及补全论证等工具，分别对插入覆盖码和删除覆盖码进行界分析和构造。

Result: 1) 插入覆盖与删除覆盖不等价；2) 建立了插入覆盖码的新下界；3) 证明了删除覆盖码的计数下界在字母表趋于无穷时渐近紧；4) 构造了渐近最优的非二元单删覆盖码；5) 证明了二元差分VT码是二突发删除的完美码；6) 构造了显式的q元二突发删除覆盖码。

Conclusion: 插入和删除覆盖码具有独特的理论性质，差分VT码在突发删除覆盖中表现出色，可构造完美码。

Abstract: Covering codes for insertions and deletions arise naturally in the study of synchronization errors and differ substantially from their classical counterparts in the Hamming metric. In this paper, we study covering codes under insertion and deletion operations. We first show that, in contrast to the equivalence between insertion and deletion correction, insertion covering and deletion covering are not equivalent. We then develop bounds and constructions for insertion and deletion covering codes, with particular emphasis on the large-alphabet regime. For insertion covering codes, we extend a recent combinatorial approach for single insertions and establish a new lower bound for arbitrary fixed insertion radius. For deletion covering codes, we relate the problem to hypergraph covering and prove that the elementary counting lower bound is asymptotically tight when the alphabet size tends to infinity. We further provide a construction of asymptotically optimal non-binary single-deletion covering codes by using differential Varshamov--Tenengolts (VT) codes together with a completion argument. In addition, we study covering codes for burst deletions. We prove that binary differential VT codes are not only capable of correcting two-burst deletions but also have the corresponding covering property, and hence form binary perfect codes for two-burst deletions. Finally, we extend this construction to non-binary alphabets and obtain explicit $q$-ary two-burst-deletion covering codes.

</details>


### [437] [Sparse Channel Estimation for SIM-based mmWave Near-Field Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15634)
*Jiancheng An,Enyu Shi,Jiayi Zhang,Lu Gan,Michail Matthaiou,Symeon Chatzinotas,Marco Di Renzo*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 针对SIM辅助的毫米波近场多用户通信系统，提出基于压缩感知和极化域稀疏贝叶斯学习的信道估计方案，解决射频链不足导致的欠定问题及近场球面波前模型下的信道稀疏表示难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 1) SIM架构中每层大量超原子导致RF链数远少于超原子数，形成欠定信道估计问题；2) 超原子数量增加扩大了SIM近场区域，用户设备多位于近场，需采用球面波前模型精确建模，但传统角域信道表示在近场存在严重能量扩散效应。

Method: 1) 引入基于压缩感知的信道估计协议解决欠定问题；2) 针对近场通信，设计面向均匀平面阵列(UPA)的新型极化域变换矩阵，将信道估计转化为路径支撑集和复增益的稀疏恢复任务；3) 提出低复杂度极化域稀疏贝叶斯学习(LCPD-SBL)算法，降低高维字典下的计算复杂度。

Result: LCPD-SBL算法在显著降低计算复杂度的同时，不牺牲估计精度。

Conclusion: 所提出的极化域压缩感知框架和LCPD-SBL算法有效解决了SIM毫米波近场多用户系统中的信道估计难题。

Abstract: In this paper, we address the channel estimation (CE) problem in SIM-based multi-user (MU) millimeter-wave (mmWave) near-field communication systems. To address the severe path loss and blockage in mmWave communication systems, many meta-atoms are typically integrated into each layer of the SIM. Then, the number of radio frequency (RF) chains at the base station (BS) is fewer than that of meta-atoms per layer, resulting in an underdetermined problem. Additionally, the increase in the number of meta-atoms in each layer expands the SIM's near-field region, leading to the user equipment (UEs) being mostly situated in this region, necessitating precise modeling of the channel under the spherical wavefront assumption. To address these issues, we introduce a compressed sensing (CS)-based CE protocol to tackle the underdetermined problem. In contrast to the traditional CS-based estimation framework, we investigate a polar-domain channel representation to tackle the severe energy spread effect of the classical angular-domain channel representation in near-field communication systems. Specifically, we design a novel polar-domain transform matrix for uniform planar arrays (UPAs), thereby transforming the CE problem into a sparse recovery task of the paths' support set and complex gains. To overcome the limitations of the sparse Bayesian learning (SBL) framework in tackling high-dimensional dictionaries, we propose a low-complexity polar-domain SBL (LCPD-SBL) algorithm, which significantly reduces computational complexity without compromising estimation accuracy.

</details>


### [438] [Twin-in-the-Loop Optimization and Fundamental Limits of Position--Velocity Estimation in Cell-Free ISAC Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15688)
*Changhao He,Xiaojuan Zhang,Geoffrey Ye Li*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文针对无蜂窝ISAC系统中的数字孪生网络，建立了联合位置-速度克拉美罗界框架，揭示了速度估计的秩亏问题，并证明了无蜂窝部署与FIM形状优化带来的性能增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字孪生网络需要与无线感知紧密集成，但在无蜂窝ISAC系统中，特别是存在流体智能超表面（FIM）时，此类耦合的基本极限尚未被充分探索。

Method: 建立了联合位置-速度CRB框架，通过速度Fisher信息的散射矩阵分解揭示单基站系统的秩亏问题；推导了闭环数字孪生框架中的临界失配角闭合表达式；提出了置信度感知的调度策略以优化同步周期。

Result: 单基站系统在二维速度估计中存在固有秩亏，而无蜂窝多接入点部署可实现完全可观测性；FIM形状优化显著提升位置精度但不影响速度CRB；多普勒耦合非对称地提升位置估计精度；无蜂窝系统中的角度多样性可减轻DT预测误差。

Conclusion: 数值结果验证了无蜂窝系统相比单基站在角度多样性、多普勒-位置耦合和FIM自适应方面的显著性能优势。

Abstract: Digital twin (DT) networks require tight integration with wireless sensing, yet the fundamental limits of such coupling in cell-free integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems remain largely unexplored, particularly in the presence of fluid intelligent metasurfaces (FIM). This paper establishes a joint position-velocity Cramer-Rao bound (CRB) framework, operationalized through a twin-in-the-loop architecture. By leveraging a scatter-matrix decomposition of the velocity Fisher information, we show that single-base-station systems are inherently rank-deficient for two-dimensional velocity estimation, whereas cell-free deployments with multiple access-point pairs achieve full observability. The resulting CRB reveals a spatio-temporal decoupling: FIM shape optimization significantly improves position accuracy but does not affect the velocity CRB under isotropic waveforms while Doppler coupling asymmetrically enhances position estimation accuracy. Building on this analysis, we develop a closed-loop DT framework, deriving the critical mismatch angle in closed form and showing that angular diversity in cell-free systems mitigates DT prediction errors. We further characterize the optimal synchronization period and propose a confidence-aware scheduling strategy that reduces the DT update rate. Numerical results demonstrate substantial performance gains over single-base-station systems, with improvements attributed to angular diversity, Doppler-position coupling, and FIM adaptation.

</details>


### [439] [Information aging in massive MIMO systems affected by phase noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16466)
*Alberto Tarable,Francisco J. Escribano*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究大规模MIMO系统中相位噪声导致的信息老化问题，提出了一种基于期望最大化（EM）的迭代接收机，在5G上行链路场景中验证了其对相位噪声信息老化的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模MIMO系统中，相位噪声会劣化传统接收技术性能，其根本原因是基于导频的相位噪声信息存在老化问题，亟待提出更鲁棒的接收方案。

Method: 在真实的5G上行链路场景中，量化了信息老化的影响，并提出了一种基于期望最大化（EM）的迭代接收机。

Result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的迭代接收机对相位噪声相关的信息老化具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 基于EM的迭代接收机能够有效应对大规模MIMO系统中相位噪声引起的信息老化问题，提升了系统在5G上行场景下的性能表现。

Abstract: In massive MIMO systems, phase noise can spoil the performance of the usual receiver techniques. The problem arises because of the aging of phase-noise information based on pilots. In this paper, in a realistic 5G uplink scenario, we quantify the impact of information aging and we propose an iterative receiver based on expectation-maximization (EM). Simulation results show that the iterative receiver is robust to information aging related to phase noise.

</details>


### [440] [Rate-Distortion for Reversible Causal Nets under Closure-Preserving Fidelity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16592)
*Jianfeng Xu*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文针对可逆日志记录问题，提出了一种在闭包保持保真度准则下的语义率失真理论。通过将执行历史建模为有限日志事实集，并利用Datalog等有效规则系统诱导的单调语义闭包捕捉回滚相关含义，引入有界失真度量（编辑日志事实并观察闭包变化）。规范删除扫描将日志分解为无冗余核心和冗余剩余部分——在可容许重构下，冗余事实在信息论意义上不可见，从而实现仅核心的率失真约简。在完美保真度下，零失真重构之间的重叠诱导出混淆超图，该超图决定最小速率。该框架在可逆因果网和可逆素事件结构上实例化，并进行了数值验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可逆日志记录中需要一种形式化理论来平衡日志压缩率与回滚语义保真度，现有率失真理论缺乏对日志语义闭包结构和可逆计算特性的适配。

Method: 提出语义率失真理论：建模执行历史为有限日志事实集，基于单调语义闭包定义回滚相关含义；引入有界失真度量（编辑事实后闭包变化）；通过规范删除扫描将日志分解为核心与冗余；在完美保真度下利用混淆超图确定最小速率。

Result: 冗余事实在可容许重构下信息论不可见，实现仅核心的率失真约简；混淆超图决定完美保真度下的最小速率；在可逆因果网和可逆素事件结构上验证了预测。

Conclusion: 建立的语义率失真理论为可逆日志记录提供了形式化压缩-保真度权衡框架，核心-冗余分解和混淆超图为日志压缩提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We develop a semantic rate-distortion theory for reversible logging under a closure-preserving fidelity criterion. An execution history is modeled as a finite set of logged facts, and rollback-relevant meaning is captured by a monotone semantic closure induced by an effective rule system such as Datalog. We introduce a bounded distortion that edits one logged fact and measures the resulting change in closure. A canonical deletion scan decomposes the log into an irredundant core and a redundant remainder; under admissible reconstructions, redundant facts become information-theoretically invisible, yielding a core-only rate-distortion reduction. At perfect fidelity, overlaps among zero-distortion reconstructions induce a confusability hypergraph that determines the minimum rate. We instantiate the framework on reversible causal nets and reversible prime event structures under multiple reversing disciplines, and validate the predictions numerically.

</details>


### [441] [Enhancing Secret Key Generation for UAV Communications via Codeword Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16644)
*Yizhuo Wang,Qinghe Du,Ning Shen,Shijiao Zhang,Lei Zhao,Yang Hu*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 针对无人机通信中信道估计误差导致密钥生成性能下降的问题，提出一种基于信道码字重构的物理层密钥生成方案。该方案利用极化特性的码字构建算法分离可靠与不可靠密钥，通过软判决解码最大化利用原始信道信息。仿真表明，该方法降低了合法用户的密钥不一致率，增加了一致密钥数量，同时降低了窃听者的密钥一致率，保证了系统安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机高机动性导致信道相干时间短，加上噪声影响，产生不可避免的信道估计误差，严重降低了无线信道密钥生成的性能。现有量化-based方案对信道信息利用率不足。

Method: 提出基于信道码字重构的密钥生成方案，包括：(1) 码字构建算法，实现极化特性以分离可靠与不可靠密钥；(2) 软判决解码生成密钥，最大化利用原始信道信息。

Result: 仿真结果表明：降低了合法用户的密钥不一致率；增加了合法用户一致生成的密钥数量；降低了窃听者的密钥一致率。

Conclusion: 所提方案相比现有基于量化的密钥生成方案，能更有效利用信道信息，在保证合法用户密钥一致性的同时，增强了对抗窃听者的安全性。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), ensuring the security of communication links among UAVs has become crucial. In this paper, we propose a novel physical layer key generation scheme based on channel codeword reconstruction. In UAV communications, the high mobility of aerial nodes leads to short channel coherence time, which together with noise causes inevitable channel estimation errors. These errors significantly degrades the performance of wireless channel-based key generation. Therefore, we propose a codeword construction algorithm that achieves a polarization characteristic, which effectively segregates reliable keys from unreliable ones. Compared to the existing quantization-based key generation scheme, our approach maximize the utilization of raw channel information and employ soft-decision decoding to generate key. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed scheme reduces the key disagreement rate for legitimate users and increases the number of consistently generated keys. Furthermore, our method ensures a lower key consistency rate for eavesdropper, which guarantees system security.

</details>


### [442] [A Lean-Certified Proof of $K_8(4, 2) = 23$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16688)
*Andreas Florath*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文在Lean 4中形式化证明八进制覆盖码值K₈(4,2)=23：上界通过一个显式23词码字给出并在全体8⁴个空间词上验证，下界通过纤维计数和缺失对论证排除21词及以下情况，并在22词情形下将问题归约为六个缺失对图，经LRAT反演和结构分析证明不可能，最终打包为Lean可复现的证明工件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精确确定八进制覆盖码值K₈(4,2)这一组合编码理论中的具体参数，并通过形式化验证确保证明的可靠性和可复现性。

Method: 上界通过构造显式23词半径2码并穷举8⁴个空间词验证；下界先利用纤维计数和缺失对论证排除≤21词情形；对22词情形，将假设覆盖归约为六个坐标对投影的缺失对图，结合纤维计数约束与两个Lean验证的LRAT反演（对存储的CNF实例）强制推导出3+3+2块结构，最终证明该结构与22词覆盖矛盾。

Result: 证明K₈(4,2)=23，即八进制覆盖码值精确确定为23。

Conclusion: 该结果以证明携带的Lean工件形式呈现，包含显式上界、结构性下界、CNF实例及LRAT反演，均在Lean内部完成验证，无需外部SAT求解器参与证明复现。

Abstract: We prove the exact octonary covering-code value $K_8(4, 2) = 23$ in Lean 4. The upper bound is given by an explicit 23-word radius-two code in $(Fin\:8)^4$ , checked over all $8^4$ ambient words. The lower bound excludes covers with at most 22 words. A fiber-counting and missing-pair argument first rules out covers with at most 21 words. In the remaining 22-word case, the proof reduces a hypothetical cover to six missing-pair graphs coming from the coordinate-pair projections. Fiber-counting arguments constrain these graphs, and two Lean-checked Linear RAT (LRAT) refutations of stored conjunctive-normal-form (CNF) instances force a common 3 + 3 + 2 block structure. This structure is incompatible with a 22-word cover: the two three-symbol components already force 18 codewords, while the remaining two-symbol component would require a binary strength-two array of length four with at most four rows, which is impossible. The result is packaged as a proof-carrying Lean artifact: the explicit upper bound, structural lower bound, CNF instances, and LRAT refutations are checked inside Lean, with no external SAT solver used during proof replay.

</details>


### [443] [Testing for a Hidden Geometry in Random Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16715)
*Amit Silber,Mor Oren-Loberman,Wasim Huleihel*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文研究在随机图中检测隐藏几何信号的假设检验问题，推导了信息论下界，揭示了"容易—困难—不可能"的相变现象，并证明了低度多项式算法在推测的困难区域失效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在随机图中检测微弱的几何结构信号是一个基础性的统计推断问题，其统计与计算极限尚不清晰。本文旨在刻画该检测问题的信息论极限和计算复杂度边界。

Method: 采用假设检验框架：原假设为Erdős–Rényi随机图，备择假设为在k个顶点上植入随机几何图。通过信息论下界推导不可检测区域，设计达到极限的检测算法，并利用低度多项式方法分析计算复杂度。

Result: 导出了检测问题的尖锐信息论下界，确定了可检测与不可检测的相变边界；发现了"容易—困难—不可能"的三重相变；证明了低度多项式算法在推测的困难区域完全失效。

Conclusion: 隐藏几何检测问题存在统计与计算可行性之间的显著差距：某些区域统计上可检测但计算上困难，表明该问题存在固有的计算障碍。

Abstract: We study the problem of detecting a faint geometric signal hidden in an otherwise random graph. Formally, we consider a hypothesis testing problem in which, under the null, the observed graph is an Erdős--Rényi random graph $\mathcal{G}(n,q)$, while under the alternative a random geometric graph $\mathcal{G}(k,q,d)$ is planted on $k\le n$ vertices. The planted subgraph is generated from independent random points on the unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$, with edges determined by latent geometric proximity and calibrated to have edge density $q$. Our goal is to characterize the statistical and computational limits of detecting this hidden geometry.
  We derive sharp information-theoretic lower bounds that identify regimes where detection is impossible and provide algorithms that achieve these limits whenever detection is feasible. We further investigate the computational complexity of the problem and determine when efficient polynomial-time tests exist. The model exhibits an \emph{easy--hard--impossible} phase transition: some regimes allow efficient detection, others permit detection only with computationally intractable procedures, and still others render detection impossible even with unlimited computational power. As evidence for the computational barrier, we prove that all low-degree polynomial algorithms fail throughout the conjecturally hard regime, demonstrating a sharp gap between statistical and computational feasibility.

</details>


### [444] [Set Shaping Theory Applied to Universal Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16746)
*Alix Petit,Aida Koch,Logan Lewis,Lily Scott*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出集合塑造理论（SST）变换，通过将均匀生成序列映射为扩展序列，在无需修改编码机制的前提下，系统性降低了多种通用编码器（自适应算术编码、枚举编码、LZ78、自适应霍夫曼编码、自适应ANS）的平均编码长度，使其低于Krichevsky-Trofimov基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 均匀生成序列代表最困难的编码测试场景（纯随机、无可利用偏差），传统频率估计型通用编码器受限于Krichevsky-Trofimov基线。本文旨在探索SST变换能否突破这一理论下限，在不修改编码器内部机制的情况下改善通用编码性能。

Method: 将输入序列s∈A^N通过SST变换映射为扩展序列f(s)∈A^(N+1)，利用额外符号存储变换索引以保证可逆性。比较原始序列的KT基线N·H_0(s)+R_KT(s)与变换后的得分(N+1)·H_0(f(s))+R_KT(f(s))，其中H_0基于经验频率计算。

Result: SST变换在多种压缩架构（自适应算术编码、枚举编码、LZ78、自适应霍夫曼编码、自适应ANS）上均实现了编码长度缩减，低于KT基线。所有结果可通过公开模拟器复现。

Conclusion: SST变换可作为表示层面的预处理层，在不修改编码器内部机制的前提下，结构性改善现有通用编码器的性能。这为通用编码提供了一种新的理论工具和实用方法。

Abstract: Universal coders process individual sequences without assuming that the source distribution is known. In this setting, uniformly generated sequences represent the most difficult test case: the source simulates pure randomness, contains no exploitable bias, and forces a frequency-estimating universal coder to infer the empirical composition entirely from the sequence itself. This paper reports that a Set Shaping Theory (SST) transformation systematically reduces the average universal coding length of uniformly generated sequences below the Krichevsky-Trofimov baseline N H_0(s) + R_KT(s). The transformation maps each input sequence s in A^N into an expanded sequence f(s) in A^(N+1), while storing the transformation index in the additional symbol in order to preserve reversibility. The comparison evaluates the exact Krichevsky-Trofimov baseline N H_0(s) + R_KT(s) against the shaped score (N+1)H_0(f(s)) + R_KT(f(s)), where H_0 is computed from the empirical frequencies of the individual sequence. A single unified transformation also yields reductions across distinct compression architectures, including adaptive arithmetic coding, enumerative coding, LZ78, adaptive Huffman coding, and adaptive ANS. These results support the interpretation of SST as a representation-level preprocessing layer that can structurally improve existing universal coders without requiring internal modifications to their coding mechanisms. All results reported in the article can be reproduced with the simulator available at https://sst-simulator.github.io/Set-Shaping-Theory-Simulator/.

</details>


### [445] [Mixed Block Markov Superposition Transmission Codes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16831)
*Philipp Mohr,Jasper Brüggmann,Viet Hoang Le,Gerhard Bauch*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出混合BMST（mBMST）码，通过并行和串行级联递归与非递归分量，综合两者优势，在降低存储需求的同时提升FER和BER性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有递归BMST码存在错误传播但无非高错误平层，非递归BMST码则相反；为综合两者互补特性，提出混合方案。

Method: 将递归与非递归BMST分量通过并行和串行级联方式组合，形成混合BMST（mBMST）码框架，涵盖现有BMST变体并支持新结构。

Result: 仿真表明mBMST码在FER和BER性能上优于现有方案，且存储需求低于递归BMST码。

Conclusion: mBMST码通过混合级联有效平衡了错误传播与错误平层问题，实现了性能与复杂度的更好折中。

Abstract: Block Markov superposition transmission (BMST) codes provide a flexible framework for constructing codes with near-capacity performance and low-complexity sliding-window decoding. However, existing BMST variants show contrasting performance limitations: recursive BMST (rBMST) codes suffer from error propagation but avoid high error floors, whereas non-recursive BMST codes exhibit the opposite behavior. Motivated by these complementary characteristics, we combine recursive and non-recursive components through parallel and serial concatenation, yielding mixed BMST (mBMST) codes. The proposed framework subsumes existing BMST variants and enables new BMST structures. Simulations show that these structures improve FER and BER performance with lower memory requirements than rBMST.

</details>
